1472:
SELECT c.CustomerID, SUM(y.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth y
JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE y.Date LIKE '2012%'
GROUP BY c.CustomerID
ORDER BY TotalConsumption ASC
LIMIT 1;
SELECT CustomerID FROM yearmonth WHERE Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212' GROUP BY CustomerID ORDER BY SUM(Consumption) ASC LIMIT 1;

SELECT CustomerID, SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth
WHERE Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212'
GROUP BY CustomerID
ORDER BY TotalConsumption ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.CustomerID
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID AND y.Date LIKE '2012%'
WHERE c.Segment = 'LAM'
ORDER BY y.Consumption ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T1.CustomerID, T2.Segment FROM yearmonth AS T1 JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212' AND T2.Segment = 'LAM' ORDER BY T1.Consumption ASC LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2012'
AND c.Segment = 'LAM'
ORDER BY y.Consumption ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.CustomerID, T2.Segment, T2.Currency FROM yearmonth AS T1 INNER JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Date LIKE '2012%' AND T2.Segment = 'LAM' ORDER BY T1.Consumption ASC LIMIT 1
1473:
SELECT AVG(Consumption) / 12 AS AverageMonthlyConsumption
FROM yearmonth
JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE customers.Segment = 'SME'
AND LEFT(yearmonth.Date, 4) = '2013';

SELECT AVG(Consumption) / 12 AS AverageMonthlyConsumption
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME'
AND SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) BETWEEN '2013' AND '2013';

SELECT AVG(Consumption) / 12 AS AverageMonthlyConsumption
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME'
AND LEFT(y.Date, 4) = '2013';

SELECT AVG(Consumption) / 12 AS AverageMonthlyConsumption
FROM customers

WHERE customers.Segment = 'SME'
AND yearmonth.Date LIKE '2013%';

FROM yearmonth AS T1
JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE T2.Segment = 'SME'
AND T1.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312';

SELECT AVG(yearmonth.Consumption) / 12 AS AvgMonthlyConsumption

1471:
SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 END) AS Ratio_EUR_to_CZK
FROM 
    customers;

SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 END) AS Ratio_EUR_to_CZK
FROM 
    customers;

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio_EUR_CZK
FROM customers;

SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) / COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS ratio
FROM customers;

SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'EUR' THEN T1.CustomerID ELSE NULL END) * 1.0 /
    COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'CZK' THEN T1.CustomerID ELSE NULL END) AS ratio
FROM 
    customers AS T1
JOIN 
    transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T1.Currency IN ('EUR', 'CZK');
SELECT CAST((SELECT COUNT(CustomerID) FROM customers WHERE Currency = 'EUR') AS REAL) / (SELECT COUNT(CustomerID) FROM customers WHERE Currency = 'CZK') AS Ratio;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio
FROM 
    customers AS T1
JOIN 
    transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
1480:
SELECT SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) AS Year, SUBSTR(Date, 5, 2) AS Month, SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth
JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE customers.Segment = 'SME' AND Year = '2013'
GROUP BY Year, Month
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    ym.Date AS YearMonth,
    SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
WHERE 
    c.Segment = 'SME'
    AND ym.Date LIKE '2013%'
GROUP BY 
    ym.Date
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(Date, 1, 6) AS Month,
    SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE 
    c.Segment = 'SME' AND
    y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
GROUP BY 
    Month
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT SUBSTR(Date, 5, 2) AS Month, SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME' AND Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
GROUP BY Month
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    ym.Date AS Month,
    SUM(t.Amount) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    transactions_1k t
JOIN 
    customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
JOIN 
    yearmonth ym ON t.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
WHERE 
    ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    AND c.Segment = 'SME'
GROUP BY 
    ym.Date
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(T1.Date, 5, 2) AS Month,
    SUM(T1.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    yearmonth AS T1
JOIN 
    customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T2.Segment = 'SME' AND 
    SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
GROUP BY 
    Month
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
    SUBSTR(Date, 5, 2) AS Month,
    SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    yearmonth
JOIN 
    customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE 
    customers.Segment = 'SME'
    AND Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
GROUP BY 
    Year, Month
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT ym.Date::text AS Year, SUM(t.Amount) AS TotalConsumption
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN yearmonth ym ON t.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID AND t.Date LIKE CONCAT(ym.Date, '%')
WHERE t.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY ym.Date::text
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
    SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    yearmonth
JOIN 
    customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE 
    customers.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY 
    Year
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(T2.Date, 1, 4) AS Year,

FROM

    yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE

SELECT STRFTIME('%Y', T2.Date) AS Year, SUM(T3.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM customers AS T1
JOIN transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
JOIN yearmonth AS T3 ON T2.Date = T3.Date
WHERE T1.Currency = 'CZK'

ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ym.Date) AS Year,
    SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption

    customers c

    transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID

    yearmonth ym ON t.Date = ym.Date AND t.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID

LIMIT 1;

SELECT strftime('%Y', T1.Date) AS Year, SUM(T1.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption

JOIN transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID

SELECT SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) FROM yearmonth AS T1 JOIN transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T2.Currency = 'CZK' GROUP BY SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) ORDER BY SUM(T2.Amount) DESC LIMIT 1

1481:
WITH filtered_transactions AS (
    SELECT 
        t.CustomerID,
        t.Amount,
        y.Consumption
    FROM 
        transactions_1k t
    JOIN 
        yearmonth y ON t.CustomerID = y.CustomerID AND t.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    WHERE 
        t.Currency = 'CZK'
),
grouped_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        AVG(f.Amount + f.Consumption) AS avg_annual_consumption
    FROM 
        filtered_transactions f
    JOIN 
        customers c ON f.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    GROUP BY 
        c.Segment
)
SELECT 
    SegmentA AS Segment1,
    SegmentB AS Segment2,
    (avg_annual_consum_SegmentA - avg_annual_consum_SegmentB) AS difference
FROM 
    grouped_consumption gc
WHERE 
    Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
ORDER BY 
    Segment;

SELECT 
    T2.Segment,
    AVG(T1.Consumption) AS AvgAnnualConsumption
FROM 
    yearmonth AS T1
JOIN 
    customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T1.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    AND T2.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY 
    T2.Segment;

SELECT 
    Segment,
    AVG(Consumption) AS AnnualAverageConsumption
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE 
    c.Currency = 'CZK'
    AND y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
GROUP BY 
    Segment;

WITH filtered_data AS (
    SELECT 
        ym.CustomerID,
        ym.Date,
        c.Segment,
        ym.Consumption
    FROM 
        yearmonth ym
    JOIN 
        customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE 
        ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
),
grouped_data AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        AVG(Consumption) AS avg_consumption
    FROM 
        filtered_data
    GROUP BY 
        Segment
)
SELECT 
    g1.Segment AS Segment1,
    g2.Segment AS Segment2,
    g1.avg_consumption - g2.avg_consumption AS diff
FROM 
    grouped_data g1
JOIN 
    grouped_data g2 ON g1.Segment < g2.Segment
ORDER BY 
    g1.Segment;

WITH filtered_transactions AS (
    SELECT * FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE strftime('%Y', Date) = '2013' AND Currency = 'CZK'
),
customer_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        t.CustomerID,
        g.Segment,
        SUM(t.Amount) AS TotalConsumption,
        COUNT(t.TransactionID) AS NumberOfTransactions
    FROM 
        filtered_transactions t
    JOIN 
        yearmonth y ON t.CustomerID = y.CustomerID AND strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2013'
    JOIN 
        gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
    GROUP BY 
        t.CustomerID, g.Segment
)
SELECT 
    AVG(TotalConsumption) AS AvgConsumption
FROM 
    customer_consumption
WHERE 
    CustomerID IN (
        SELECT CustomerID
        FROM customer_consumption
        ORDER BY TotalConsumption ASC
        LIMIT 1
    )
GROUP BY 
    Segment;

-- Step 1: Filter transactions by year 2013
WITH filtered_transactions AS (
    SELECT t.TransactionID, t.CustomerID, c.Segment
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE SUBSTR(t.Date, 1, 6) BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
),

-- Step 2: Find the minimum consumption in each segment
min_consumption_per_segment AS (
    SELECT Segment, MIN(Consumption) AS MinConsumption
    FROM yearmonth
    GROUP BY Segment
)

-- Step 3: Calculate the annual average consumption for each segment
annual_average_consumption AS (
    SELECT f.Segment, AVG(f.Amount * f.Price) / COUNT(DISTINCT f.CustomerID) AS AvgAnnualConsumption
    FROM filtered_transactions f
    JOIN min_consumption_per_segment m ON f.CustomerID IN (
        SELECT CustomerID
        FROM yearmonth
        WHERE Consumption = m.MinConsumption AND Segment = f.Segment
    )
    GROUP BY f.Segment
)

-- Step 4: Find the differences between the annual average consumption of each pair of segments
SELECT 
    'SME vs LAM' AS Pair,
    AVG_AvgAnnualConsumption.SME - AVG_AvgAnnualConsumption.LAM AS Difference
FROM annual_average_consumption AA
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT SME, LAM, KAM
    FROM annual_average_consumption
) AVG_AvgAnnualConsumption
WHERE AVG_AvgAnnualConsumption.SME IS NOT NULL AND AVG_AvgAnnualConsumption.LAM IS NOT NULL;

-- Repeat similar steps for other pairs (LAM vs KAM, KAM vs SME)

SELECT 
    t.Segment,
    AVG(t.Consumption) AS avg_consumption
FROM 
    yearmonth y
JOIN 
    transactions_1k t ON y.CustomerID = t.CustomerID AND y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
WHERE 
    t.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY 
    t.Segment
ORDER BY 
    SUM(t.Consumption) ASC;

-- To find the differences:
WITH AvgConsumption AS (
    SELECT 
        t.Segment,
        AVG(t.Consumption) AS avg_consumption
    FROM 
        yearmonth y
    JOIN 
        transactions_1k t ON y.CustomerID = t.CustomerID AND y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    WHERE 
        t.Currency = 'CZK'
    GROUP BY 
        t.Segment
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM AvgConsumption WHERE Segment = 'SME') - 
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM AvgConsumption WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_sme_lam,
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM AvgConsumption WHERE Segment = 'LAM') - 
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM AvgConsumption WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_lam_kam,
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM AvgConsumption WHERE Segment = 'KAM') - 
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM AvgConsumption WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS diff_kam_sme;
1482:
SELECT 
    c.Segment,
    MAX(((s.Consumption_2013 - s.Consumption_2012) / s.Consumption_2013) * 100) AS MaxPercentageIncrease,
    MIN(((s.Consumption_2013 - s.Consumption_2012) / s.Consumption_2013) * 100) AS MinPercentageDecrease
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID AND y.Date LIKE '%/%/12'
JOIN 
    yearmonth y2 ON c.CustomerID = y2.CustomerID AND y2.Date LIKE '%/%/13'
GROUP BY 
    c.Segment;

SELECT c.Segment, 
       ((SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - 
        SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) / 
        SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS PercentageIncrease
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
GROUP BY c.Segment
ORDER BY ABS(PercentageIncrease);

SELECT 
    c.Segment,
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
     SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2012%' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
    SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS PercentageIncrease
FROM 
    yearmonth ym
JOIN 
    customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE 
    ym.Date LIKE '%/%'
GROUP BY 
    c.Segment
ORDER BY 
    PercentageIncrease DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH filtered_data AS (
    SELECT 
        ym.CustomerID,
        ym.Consumption,
        CASE 
            WHEN strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2012' THEN '2012'
            WHEN strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2013' THEN '2013'
        END AS Year
    FROM 
        yearmonth ym
    JOIN 
        customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE 
        c.Currency = 'EUR'
),
grouped_data AS (
    SELECT 
        SUM(CASE WHEN Year = '2012' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS Consumption_2012,
        SUM(CASE WHEN Year = '2013' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS Consumption_2013,
        c.Segment
    FROM 
        filtered_data fd
    JOIN 
        customers c ON fd.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    GROUP BY 
        c.Segment
)
SELECT 
    Segment,
    ((Consumption_2013 - Consumption_2012) / Consumption_2013) * 100 AS Percentage_Increase
FROM 
    grouped_data
ORDER BY 
    Percentage_Increase DESC;

SELECT 
    Segment,
    MAX((SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T2.Date) = '2013' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T2.Date) = '2012' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END)) / 
        SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T2.Date) = '2013' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS MaxPercentageIncrease,
    MIN((SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T2.Date) = '2013' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T2.Date) = '2012' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END)) / 
        SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T2.Date) = '2013' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS MinPercentageDecrease
FROM 
    customers AS T1
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T2.Date BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2013-12-31'
GROUP BY 
    Segment;

SELECT c.Segment, ((SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) / SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS PercentageIncrease
FROM yearmonth ym
JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013')
GROUP BY c.Segment
ORDER BY PercentageIncrease DESC, PercentageIncrease ASC
LIMIT 2;

WITH consumption_data AS (
    SELECT
        CustomerID,
        SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2012' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2012,
        SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2013' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2013
    FROM
        yearmonth
    WHERE
        strftime('%Y', Date) IN ('2012', '2013')
    GROUP BY
        CustomerID
),
percentage_increase AS (
    SELECT
        CustomerID,
        Segment,
        ((consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) / consumption_2013) * 100 AS percentage_increase
    FROM
        consumption_data
    JOIN
        customers ON consumption_data.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
)
SELECT
    Segment,
    MAX(percentage_increase) AS max_percentage_increase,
    MIN(percentage_increase) AS min_percentage_increase
FROM
    percentage_increase
GROUP BY
    Segment;

1484:
SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN Segment != '' THEN 1 END) AS DiscountGasStations
FROM gasstations
WHERE Country IN ('CZE', 'SVK')
GROUP BY Country;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS DiscountStations_CZE FROM gasstations WHERE Country = 'CZE'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS DiscountStations_SVK FROM gasstations WHERE Country = 'SVK'

-- Assuming that the presence of a gas station in either country is enough to count it as a "discount" station
-- We subtract the number of stations in Slovakia from the number of stations in the Czech Republic

WITH CzechDiscountStations AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS DiscountCount FROM gasstations WHERE Country = 'CZE'
),
SlovakiaDiscountStations AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS DiscountCount FROM gasstations WHERE Country = 'SVK'
)
SELECT (SELECT DiscountCount FROM CzechDiscountStations) - (SELECT DiscountCount FROM SlovakiaDiscountStations) AS Difference;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS DiscountGasStations_CZE - COUNT(*) AS DiscountGasStations_SVK
FROM (
    SELECT g.GasStationID
    FROM gasstations g
    JOIN transactions_1k t ON g.GasStationID = t.GasStationID
    WHERE (g.Country = 'CZE' OR g.Country = 'SVK')
      AND g.Segment = 'Discount'
) AS DiscountedGasStations;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS DiscountGasStations_Czeck FROM gasstations WHERE Country = 'CZE' AND Segment = 'Discount'
JOIN transactions_1k ON gasstations.GasStationID = transactions_1k.GasStationID

SELECT COUNT(*) AS DiscountGasStations_Slovakia FROM gasstations WHERE Country = 'SVK' AND Segment = 'Discount'
JOIN transactions_1k ON gasstations.GasStationID = transactions_1k.GasStationID

FROM 
    transactions_1k t

    gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
JOIN 
    products p ON t.ProductID = p.ProductID
WHERE 
    g.Country = 'SVK';

    products p ON t.ProductID = p.ProductID

SELECT 
    c.CustomerID,
    c.Segment,
    c.Currency,
    AVG(t.Price / t.Amount) AS AvgPricePerItem,
    SUM(t.Amount) AS TotalSpent
FROM 
    transactions_1k t
JOIN 
    customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
GROUP BY 
    c.CustomerID, c.Segment, c.Currency
ORDER BY 
    TotalSpent DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    t.CustomerID,
    AVG(t.Price) AS AveragePricePerItem,
    c.Currency
FROM 
    transactions_1k t
JOIN 
    customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
GROUP BY 
    t.CustomerID, c.Currency
ORDER BY 
    SUM(t.Amount) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.CustomerID, AVG(t.Price / t.Amount) AS AvgPricePerItem, c.Currency
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
GROUP BY c.CustomerID
ORDER BY SUM(t.Amount) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    T1.CustomerID,
    AVG(T1.Price / T1.Amount) AS AveragePricePerItem,
    T2.Currency
FROM 
    transactions_1k AS T1
JOIN 
    customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
GROUP BY 
    T1.CustomerID, T2.Currency
ORDER BY 
    SUM(T1.Amount) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    c.CustomerID, 
    c.Segment, 
    c.Currency, 
    AVG(t.Price / t.Amount) AS AvgPricePerItem 
FROM 
    customers c 
JOIN 
    transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID 
WHERE 
    c.CustomerID = (SELECT CustomerID FROM transactions_1k GROUP BY CustomerID ORDER BY SUM(Amount) DESC LIMIT 1)
GROUP BY 
    c.CustomerID, 
    c.Segment, 
    c.Currency;

SELECT 
    t.CustomerID,
    AVG(t.Price / t.Amount) AS AvgPricePerItem,
    c.Currency
FROM 
    transactions_1k t
JOIN 
    customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE 
    t.CustomerID = (
        SELECT 
            CustomerID 
        FROM 
            transactions_1k 
        GROUP BY 
            CustomerID 
        ORDER BY 
            SUM(Amount) DESC 
        LIMIT 1
    )
GROUP BY 
    t.CustomerID, c.Currency;

SELECT 
    (SELECT Currency 
     FROM customers 
     WHERE CustomerID = (SELECT CustomerID 
                         FROM transactions_1k 
                         GROUP BY CustomerID 
                         ORDER BY SUM(Amount) DESC 
                         LIMIT 1)) AS Currency,
    (SELECT AVG(Price) / AVG(Amount) 
     FROM transactions_1k 
     WHERE CustomerID = (SELECT CustomerID 
                         FROM transactions_1k 
                         GROUP BY CustomerID 
                         ORDER BY SUM(Amount) DESC 
                         LIMIT 1)) AS AvgPricePerItem;

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t1.Date) = 2012 THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t1.Date) = 2013 THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
     SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t1.Date) = 2012 THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) AS ConsumptionDecreaseRate
FROM 
    transactions_1k t1
JOIN 
    yearmonth ym ON t1.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
WHERE 
    t1.Amount = 634.8 AND 
    t1.Date = '2012-08-25';

SELECT 
    (t2.Consumption - t3.Consumption) / t2.Consumption AS ConsumptionDecreaseRate
FROM 
    transactions_1k t1
JOIN 
    yearmonth t2 ON t1.CustomerID = t2.CustomerID AND t2.Date LIKE '2012%'
JOIN 
    yearmonth t3 ON t1.CustomerID = t3.CustomerID AND t3.Date LIKE '2013%'
WHERE 
    t1.Amount = 634.8 AND t1.Date = '2012-08-25';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y-%m', T2.Date) = '2012' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y-%m', T2.Date) = '2013' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
     SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y-%m', T2.Date) = '2012' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) AS ConsumptionDecreaseRate
FROM 
    transactions_1k AS T1
JOIN 
    yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T1.Amount = 634.8 AND 
    T1.Date = '2012-08-25';

SELECT 
    (T1.consumption_2012 - T1.consumption_2013) / T1.consumption_2012 AS consumption_decrease_rate
FROM (
    SELECT 
        SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(Date, 1, 7) = '2012-08' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2012,
        SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(Date, 1, 7) = '2013-08' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2013
    FROM 
        transactions_1k
    JOIN 
        yearmonth ON transactions_1k.CustomerID = yearmonth.CustomerID AND transactions_1k.Date = yearmonth.Date
    WHERE 
        transactions_1k.Amount = 634.8 AND transactions_1k.Date = '2012-08-25'
) AS T1;

WITH CustomerTransaction AS (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE Date = '2012-08-25' AND Amount = 634.8
),
ConsumptionData AS (
    SELECT 
        ym.YearMonth,
        SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
    FROM 
        yearmonth ym
    JOIN 
        CustomerTransaction ct ON ym.CustomerID = ct.CustomerID
    WHERE 
        ym.Date LIKE '%/%/2012%' OR ym.Date LIKE '%/%/2013%'
    GROUP BY 
        ym.YearMonth
)
SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '%/%/2012%' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '%/%/2013%' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
    SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date LIKE '%/%/2012%' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS ConsumptionDecreaseRate
FROM 
    yearmonth ym
JOIN 
    CustomerTransaction ct ON ym.CustomerID = ct.CustomerID;

WITH customer_transaction AS (
  SELECT CustomerID FROM transactions_1k WHERE Date = '2012-08-25' AND Amount = 634.8
),
consumption_data AS (
  SELECT CustomerID, SUM(Consumption) AS consumption
  FROM yearmonth
  WHERE CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM customer_transaction)
  GROUP BY CustomerID, strftime('%Y', Date)
)
SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2012' THEN consumption ELSE 0 END) -
        SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2013' THEN consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
       SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2012' THEN consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_decrease_rate
FROM consumption_data;

1376:
SELECT e.event_name, b.spent / b.amount AS spend_to_budget_ratio
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
ORDER BY spend_to_budget_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.event_id, e.event_name, SUM(b.spent) / SUM(b.amount) AS spend_to_budget_ratio
FROM event e
INNER JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
ORDER BY spend_to_budget_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.event_name, b.spent, b.amount, CAST(b.spent AS REAL) / b.amount AS spend_to_budget_ratio
FROM budget b
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
ORDER BY spend_to_budget_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.event_name, b.spent / b.amount AS spend_to_budget_ratio
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
JOIN expense x ON e.event_id = x.link_to_event
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
ORDER BY spend_to_budget_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.event_name, (b.spent / b.amount) AS spend_to_budget_ratio
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
JOIN expense ex ON b.budget_id = ex.link_to_budget
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
ORDER BY spend_to_budget_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.event_id, e.event_name, b.spent, b.amount, (b.spent / b.amount) AS spend_to_budget_ratio
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
ORDER BY spend_to_budget_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.event_name, b.spent / b.remaining AS spend_to_budget_ratio
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
ORDER BY spend_to_budget_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

JOIN expense AS e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member 
WHERE e.expense_description = 'Water, Veggie tray, supplies'

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, e.cost 
FROM expense e 
JOIN member m ON e.link_to_member = m.member_id 
WHERE e.expense_description = 'Water, Veggie tray, supplies';

SELECT DISTINCT m.first_name, m.last_name, e.cost
FROM member AS m
JOIN expense AS e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
WHERE e.expense_description = 'Water, Veggie tray, supplies';
SELECT DISTINCT T2.first_name, T2.last_name, T1.cost FROM expense AS T1 JOIN member AS T2 ON T1.link_to_member = T2.member_id WHERE T1.expense_description = 'Water, Veggie tray, supplies'

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, SUM(e.cost) AS total_cost
FROM expense e
JOIN attendance a ON e.link_to_member = a.link_to_member
JOIN member m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
WHERE e.expense_description = 'Water, Veggie tray, supplies'
GROUP BY m.link_to_member;

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, SUM(e.cost) AS total_cost
FROM member m
INNER JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
WHERE e.expense_description = 'Water, Veggie tray, supplies'
GROUP BY m.member_id;

WHERE T2.cost > (SELECT AVG(cost) FROM expense)

    m.first_name,
    m.last_name,
    m.phone

    expense e
JOIN 
    member m ON e.link_to_member = m.member_id
GROUP BY 
    e.link_to_member

WHERE T2.cost > (SELECT AVG(T2.cost) FROM expense AS T2 WHERE T2.link_to_member = T1.member_id GROUP BY T2.link_to_member)
1149:
SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN E.Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN E.Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS PercentageDeviation
FROM 
    Examination AS E
JOIN 
    Patient AS P ON E.ID = P.ID
WHERE 
    P.SEX = 'M';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 AS "Percentage Deviation"
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE 
    p.SEX = 'M';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN p.Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN p.Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DeviationPercentage
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE 
    p.SEX = 'M';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS DeviationPercentage
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE 
    p.SEX = 'M';

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / 
     COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END)) * 100 AS DeviationPercentage
FROM 
    Patient AS T1
JOIN 
    Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE 
    T1.SEX = 'M';

SELECT 
    ((CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
     NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)) * 100) AS DeviationPercentage
FROM 
    Patient AS T1
JOIN 
    Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE 
    T1.SEX = 'M';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS PercentageInPatients,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS PercentageOutPatients
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE 
    p.SEX = 'M';

1168:
SELECT 
    MIN(e.`Examination Date`) AS Earliest_Exam_Date,
    MAX(l.`Date`) AS Latest_Lab_Date,
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthday, p.`First Date`) AS Age_At_First_Arrival
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    p.Diagnosis = 'SJS';

SELECT l.Date, (YEAR(e.First Date) - YEAR(p.Birthday)) AS Age
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Examination e ON l.Patient_ID = e.ID
JOIN Patient p ON l.Patient_ID = p.ID
WHERE e.Diagnosis LIKE '%SJS%'
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.`First Date`, p.Birthday, l.Date
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    l.Date AS Lab_Completion_Date,
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthday, YEAR(p.`First Date`)) AS Age_At_Admission
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY 
    p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    l.Date AS LabCompletionDate,
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthday, p.First_Date) AS AgeAtAdmission
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY 
    p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT t1.Date, DATEDIFF(YEAR, t2.Birthday, t2.First Date) AS AgeAtAdmission
FROM Laboratory AS t1
JOIN Patient AS t2 ON t1.ID = t2.ID
WHERE t2.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY t2.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    MAX(T1.Birthday) AS OldestBirthday,
    YEAR(T1.First Date) - YEAR(MAX(T1.Birthday)) AS AgeAtInitialArrival,
    MAX(T2.Date) AS LabWorkCompletionDate
FROM 
    Patient AS T1
JOIN 
    Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE 
    T1.Diagnosis = 'SJS';

1169:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND UA <= 8.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'F' AND UA <= 6.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio
FROM 
    Laboratory
JOIN 
    Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'M' AND L.UA <= 8.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'F' AND L.UA <= 6.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio_Male_to_Female
FROM 
    Patient P
JOIN 
    Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.SEX = 'M' AND T2.UA <= 8.0 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) / 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.SEX = 'F' AND T2.UA <= 6.5 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS Ratio_Male_to_Female
FROM 
    Patient AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'M' AND L.UA <= 8.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'F' AND L.UA <= 6.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Male_Female_Ratio
FROM 
    Patient P
INNER JOIN 
    Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'M' AND l.UA <= 8.0 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) / 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA <= 6.5 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS Ratio
FROM 
    Patient p
INNER JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.UA <= '8.0' AND T2.SEX = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.UA <= '6.5' AND T2.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS MaleToFemaleRatio
FROM 
    Laboratory AS T1
JOIN 
    Patient AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND UA <= 8.0 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) / 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN SEX = 'F' AND UA <= 6.5 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS Male_Female_Ratio
FROM 
    Patient;
1175:
SELECT 
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthday, e.`Examination Date`) AS Age,
    p.Diagnosis
FROM 
    Examination e
JOIN 
    Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
ORDER BY 
    e.HGB DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    YEAR(e.`Examination Date`) - YEAR(p.Birthday) AS Age,
    p.Diagnosis,
    l.HGB
FROM 
    Examination e
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON e.Patient_ID = l.Patient_ID
JOIN 
    Patient p ON e.Patient_ID = p.ID
WHERE 
    l.HGB = (SELECT MAX(HGB) FROM Laboratory)

SELECT 
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthday, l.Date) AS Age,
    p.Diagnosis
FROM 
    Laboratory l
JOIN 
    Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE 
    l.HGB = (SELECT MAX(HGB) FROM Laboratory)

SELECT 
    YEAR(e.`Examination Date`) - YEAR(p.Birthday) AS Age,
    p.Diagnosis,
    l.HGB
FROM 
    Examination e
JOIN 
    Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    l.HGB = (SELECT MAX(HGB) FROM Laboratory);

SELECT 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM E.`Examination Date`) - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM P.Birthday) AS Age,
    P.Diagnosis
FROM 
    Examination AS E
JOIN 
    Patient AS P ON E.ID = P.ID
WHERE 
    E.`Examination Date` = P.Birthday
ORDER BY 
    E.HGB DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    YEAR(T1.`Examination Date`) - YEAR(T2.Birthday) AS Age,
    T2.Diagnosis,
    T1.ID
FROM 
    Examination AS T1
JOIN 
    Patient AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
ORDER BY 
    T1.HGB DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    YEAR(t1.`Examination Date`) - YEAR(t2.Birthday) AS Age,
    t2.Diagnosis,
    t1.Diagnosis
FROM 
    Examination AS t1
JOIN 
    Patient AS t2 ON t1.ID = t2.ID
ORDER BY 
    t1.HGB DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Date BETWEEN '1981-11-01' AND '1981-11-30' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Date BETWEEN '1981-12-01' AND '1981-12-31' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) AS DecreaseRate
FROM 
    Laboratory
WHERE 
    Birthday = '1959-02-18';

SELECT 
    ((AVG(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-11-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE NULL END) - AVG(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE NULL END)) / AVG(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE NULL END)) AS DecreaseRate
FROM 
    Laboratory
JOIN 
    Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE 
    Patient.Birthday = '1959-02-18';

SELECT 
    (AVG(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-11-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE NULL END) - AVG(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE NULL END)) / 
    AVG(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE NULL END) AS DecreaseRate
FROM 
    Laboratory
JOIN 
    Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE 
    Patient.Birthday = '1959-02-18';

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-11-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN `T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) AS DecreaseRate
FROM 
    Laboratory
INNER JOIN 
    Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE 
    Patient.Birthday = '1959-02-18';

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Date LIKE '1981-11-%' THEN T2.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN T2.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN T2.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) AS DecreaseRate
FROM 
    Patient AS T1
JOIN 
    Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE 
    T1.Birthday = '1959-02-18';

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Date BETWEEN '1981-11-01' AND '1981-11-30' THEN T2.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) / 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Date BETWEEN '1981-12-01' AND '1981-12-31' THEN T2.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) AS DecreaseRate
FROM 
    Patient AS T1
JOIN 
    Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE 
    T1.Birthday = '1959-02-18';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN DATE LIKE '1981-11-%' AND P.Birthday = '1959-02-18' THEN L.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN DATE LIKE '1981-12-%' AND P.Birthday = '1959-02-18' THEN L.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) / 
     SUM(CASE WHEN DATE LIKE '1981-11-%' AND P.Birthday = '1959-02-18' THEN L.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS DecreaseRate
FROM 
    Laboratory L
JOIN 
    Patient P ON L.ID = P.ID
WHERE 
    P.Birthday = '1959-02-18' AND 
    (L.Date BETWEEN '1981-11-01' AND '1981-11-30' OR L.Date BETWEEN '1981-12-01' AND '1981-12-31');

SELECT CASE WHEN UA > 8.0 AND SEX = 'M' OR UA > 6.5 AND SEX = 'F' THEN 'Normal Range' ELSE 'Outside Normal Range' END AS UrineAcidStatus
FROM Laboratory
JOIN Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE Patient.ID = 57266;

SELECT CASE 
         WHEN l.UA > 8.0 AND p.SEX = 'M' OR l.UA > 6.5 AND p.SEX = 'F' THEN 'Normal Range'
         ELSE 'Outside Normal Range'
       END AS UA_Normal_Range
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE p.ID = 57266;

SELECT 
    ID, 
    UA, 
    SEX, 
    CASE 
        WHEN SEX = 'M' AND UA > 8.0 THEN 'Normal'
        WHEN SEX = 'F' AND UA > 6.5 THEN 'Normal'
        ELSE 'Abnormal'
    END AS UA_Range
FROM 
    Patient
WHERE 
    ID = 57266;

WHERE l.RBC < 3.5;

WHERE l.RBC < 3.5;

    (SUM(CASE WHEN PLT > 400 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS DIFFERENCE
FROM 
    Laboratory;

SELECT DISTINCT p.ID
FROM Laboratory l
INNER JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE YEAR(l.Date) = 1984
  AND SUBTRACT(YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), YEAR(p.Birthday)) < 50
  AND l.PLT BETWEEN 100 AND 400;

FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.Date) = 1984
AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM p.Birthday) < 50
AND l.PLT BETWEEN 100 AND 400;

FROM Laboratory l

AND p.Age BETWEEN 0 AND 49
AND l.PLT BETWEEN 100 AND 400;

WHERE YEAR(l.Date) = 1984

SELECT DISTINCT Patient.*
FROM Laboratory
JOIN Patient ON Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
WHERE YEAR(Laboratory.Date) = 1984
AND SUBTRACT(YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), YEAR(Patient.Birthday)) < 50

FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE YEAR(l.Date) = 1984
AND (CURRENT_DATE - p.Birthday) / 365.25 < 50
AND l.PLT BETWEEN 100 AND 400;

FROM Laboratory l

1243:
SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN T2.PT >= 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100 AS Percentage
FROM Patient AS T1
JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE SUBTRACT(YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), YEAR(T1.Birthday)) > 55 AND T1.SEX = 'F';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.SEX = 'F' AND T2.PT >= 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T2.PT >= 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Percentage_Female_Abnormal_PT
FROM 
    Patient AS T1
JOIN 
    Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE 
    SUBTRACT(YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), YEAR(T1.Birthday)) > 55;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.sex = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    COUNT(lab.ID) * 100 AS percentage_female_with_abnormal_pt
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Laboratory lab ON p.ID = lab.ID
WHERE 
    SUBTRACT(YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), YEAR(p.Birthday)) > 55
    AND lab.PT >= 14;

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.PT >= 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.PT) AS PercentageFemaleWithAbnormalPT
FROM Patient AS T1
JOIN Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE SUBTRACT(YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), YEAR(T1.Birthday)) > 55 AND T1.SEX = 'F';

SELECT 
    (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Laboratory.PT >= 14 AND Patient.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
     SUM(CASE WHEN Laboratory.PT >= 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS Percentage_Female_with_ABNPT
FROM 
    Patient
JOIN 
    Examination ON Patient.ID = Examination.ID
JOIN 
    Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
WHERE 
    SUBTRACT(YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), YEAR(Patient.Birthday)) > 55;

SELECT 
    (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN PT >= 14 AND SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN PT >= 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS FemalePercentage
FROM 
    Patient AS P
JOIN 
    Laboratory AS L ON P.ID = L.ID
WHERE 
    SUBTRACT(YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), YEAR(P.Birthday)) > 55;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN P.SEX = 'F' AND L.PT >= 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN L.PT >= 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 AS Percentage_Female_With_Abnormal_PT
FROM 
    Patient P
JOIN 
    Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID
WHERE 
    SUBTRACT(YEAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), YEAR(P.Birthday)) > 55;

1031:
SELECT 
    p.player_name,
    (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.birthday)) AS current_age
FROM 
    Player p
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE 
    pa.sprint_speed >= 97
    AND pa.date BETWEEN '2013-01-01' AND '2015-12-31';

SELECT strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', T1.birthday) AS age
FROM Player AS T1
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE T2.sprint_speed >= 97 AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.date) BETWEEN '2013' AND '2015'
GROUP BY T1.player_api_id;

SELECT DISTINCT p.player_api_id, strftime('%Y', T2.date) - strftime('%Y', p.birthday) AS age
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE T2.sprint_speed >= 97
AND strftime('%Y', T2.date) BETWEEN '2013' AND '2015'

SELECT player_api_id, strftime('%J', date('now')) - strftime('%J', T1.birthday) AS age
FROM Player AS T1
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE T2.sprint_speed >= 97 AND strftime('%Y', T2.date) BETWEEN '2013' AND '2015'
GROUP BY player_api_id;

SELECT 
    julianday('now') - julianday(T1.birthday) AS age,
    T1.player_name
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE 
    T2.sprint_speed >= 97 
    AND strftime('%Y', T2.date) BETWEEN '2013' AND '2015';

SELECT 
    p.player_name,
    julianday(strftime('%Y-%m-%d', 'now')) - julianday(p.birthday) AS age
FROM 
    Player p
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE 
    pa.sprint_speed >= 97
    AND strftime('%Y', pa.date) BETWEEN '2013' AND '2015'
GROUP BY 
    p.player_name;

SELECT 
    p.player_name,
    DATE_PART('year', AGE(NOW(), p.birthday)) AS age
FROM 
    Player p
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
JOIN 
    Match m ON p.player_api_id IN (m.home_player_1, m.home_player_2, m.home_player_3, m.home_player_4, m.home_player_5, m.home_player_6, m.home_player_7, m.home_player_8, m.home_player_9, m.home_player_10, m.home_player_11, m.away_player_1, m.away_player_2, m.away_player_3, m.away_player_4, m.away_player_5, m.away_player_6, m.away_player_7, m.away_player_8, m.away_player_9, m.away_player_10, m.away_player_11)
WHERE 
    pa.sprint_speed >= 97
    AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM m.date) BETWEEN 2013 AND 2015 OR EXTRACT(YEAR FROM m.date) BETWEEN 2014 AND 2015);

SELECT T1.team_long_name
FROM Team AS T1
JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.away_team_api_id
JOIN League AS T3 ON T2.league_id = T3.id
WHERE T3.name = 'Scotland Premier League' AND T2.season = '2009/2010'
GROUP BY T1.team_long_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.team_long_name, COUNT(*) AS num_wins
FROM Match AS T1
JOIN League AS T2 ON T1.league_id = T2.id
JOIN Team AS T3 ON T1.away_team_api_id = T3.team_api_id
WHERE T2.name = 'Scotland Premier League' AND T1.season = '2009/2010'
AND T1.away_team_goal > T1.home_team_goal
GROUP BY T3.team_long_name
ORDER BY num_wins DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.team_long_name, COUNT(*) AS num_wins
FROM Match AS M
JOIN League AS L ON M.league_id = L.id
JOIN Team AS T1 ON M.home_team_api_id = T1.team_api_id
JOIN Team AS T2 ON M.away_team_api_id = T2.team_api_id
WHERE L.name = 'Scotland Premier League' AND M.season = '2009/2010'
AND M.away_team_goal > M.home_team_goal
GROUP BY T2.team_long_name
ORDER BY num_wins DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.team_long_name
FROM Match AS T1
JOIN League AS T3 ON T1.league_id = T3.id
JOIN Team AS T2 ON T1.away_team_api_id = T2.team_api_id
WHERE T3.name = 'Scotland Premier League'
AND T1.season = '2009/2010'
AND T1.away_team_goal > T1.home_team_goal
GROUP BY T1.away_team_api_id
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.away_team_api_id, COUNT(*) as win_count
FROM Match AS T1
JOIN League AS T2 ON T1.league_id = T2.id
WHERE T2.name = 'Scotland Premier League' AND T1.season = '2009/2010'
AND (T1.away_team_goal - T1.home_team_goal) > 0
GROUP BY T2.away_team_api_id
ORDER BY win_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.team_long_name, COUNT(*) as num_wins
FROM Match AS T1
JOIN League AS T3 ON T1.league_id = T3.id
JOIN Team AS T2 ON T1.away_team_api_id = T2.team_api_id
WHERE T3.name = 'Scotland Premier League' AND T1.season = '2009/2010'
AND T1.away_team_goal > T1.home_team_goal
GROUP BY T2.team_long_name
ORDER BY num_wins DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T1.team_long_name
FROM Match AS M
JOIN League AS L ON M.league_id = L.id
JOIN Team AS T1 ON M.away_team_api_id = T1.team_api_id
WHERE L.name = 'Scotland Premier League' AND M.season = '2009/2010' AND M.away_team_goal > M.home_team_goal
ORDER BY COUNT(M.away_team_goal) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.player_name, AVG(pa.finishing) AS avg_finishing
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.height IN (
    SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player,
    SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player
)
GROUP BY p.player_name
ORDER BY avg_finishing DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.player_api_id, AVG(pa.finishing) AS avg_finishing
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.height IN ((SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player), (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player))
GROUP BY p.player_api_id
ORDER BY avg_finishing DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.player_name, AVG(pa.finishing) AS avg_finishing_rate
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.height IN (
    SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player,
    SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player
)
GROUP BY p.player_name
ORDER BY avg_finishing_rate DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN AVG_finishing_short > AVG_finishing_tall THEN 'Shortest Players'
        ELSE 'Tallest Players'
    END AS GroupWithHigherFinishingRate,
    AVG_finishing_short,
    AVG_finishing_tall
FROM (
    SELECT 
        MIN(height) AS min_height,
        MAX(height) AS max_height
    FROM Player
) AS HeightBounds
JOIN Player AS p ON Player.player_api_id = Player_Attributes.player_api_id
JOIN Player_Attributes AS pa ON Player.player_api_id = Player_Attributes.player_api_id
WHERE 
    Player.height <= HeightBounds.min_height OR 
    Player.height >= HeightBounds.max_height
GROUP BY 
    Player.height;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN AVG(highest_finishing) > AVG(lowest_finishing) THEN 'Highest Height Player'
        ELSE 'Lowest Height Player'
    END AS PlayerWithHigherAverageFinishingRate,
    AVG(highest_finishing) AS AverageFinishingOfHighestHeightPlayers,
    AVG(lowest_finishing) AS AverageFinishingOfLowestHeightPlayers
FROM (
    SELECT 
        p.player_api_id,
        pa.finishing AS highest_finishing,
        NULL AS lowest_finishing
    FROM 
        Player p
    JOIN 
        Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
    WHERE 
        p.height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player)
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        p.player_api_id,
        NULL AS highest_finishing,
        pa.finishing AS lowest_finishing
    FROM 
        Player p
    JOIN 
        Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
    WHERE 
        p.height = (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player)
) AS Subquery;

SELECT AVG(T2.finishing) 
FROM Player AS T1 
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id 
WHERE T1.height IN ((SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player), (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player))

SELECT p.player_api_id, p.player_name, AVG(pa.finishing) AS avg_finishing
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.height IN (
  SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player,
  SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player
)
GROUP BY p.player_api_id
ORDER BY avg_finishing DESC
LIMIT 1;

1076: SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) - AVG(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) AS diff_avg_ball_control FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id

SELECT AVG(T2.ball_control) AS avg_ball_control_diallo,
       AVG(T2.ball_control) AS avg_ball_control_appindangoye,
       AVG(T2.ball_control) - AVG(T2.ball_control) AS diff_avg_ball_control
FROM Player AS T1
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE T1.player_name IN ('Abdou Diallo', 'Aaron Appindangoye')

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T2.id ELSE NULL END)) -
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T2.id ELSE NULL END)) AS difference_of_average_ball_control
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T2.id ELSE NULL END)) -
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T2.id ELSE NULL END)) AS diff_ball_control
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T2.id ELSE NULL END)) -
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T2.id ELSE NULL END)) AS diff
FROM 
    Player AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id;

SELECT ( SELECT AVG(T2.ball_control) FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' ) - ( SELECT AVG(T2.ball_control) FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' ) AS difference_of_average_ball_control;

SELECT 
    (SELECT AVG(pa.ball_control)
     FROM Player p
     JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo') -
    
    (SELECT AVG(pa.ball_control)
     FROM Player p
     JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye') AS diff;

1094:
SELECT 
    ((SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes JOIN Player ON Player_Attributes.player_api_id = Player.player_api_id WHERE Player.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk') 
     - 
     (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes JOIN Player ON Player_Attributes.player_api_id = Player.player_api_id WHERE Player.player_name = 'Paulin Puel')) * 
    100 / 
    (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes JOIN Player ON Player_Attributes.player_api_id = Player.player_api_id WHERE Player.player_name = 'Paulin Puel') AS percentage_difference;

SELECT 
    ((T2.overall_rating - T3.overall_rating) / T3.overall_rating) * 100 AS percentage_increase
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T3 ON T1.player_api_id = T3.player_api_id
WHERE 
    T1.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk' AND T1.player_name = 'Paulin Puel';

SELECT 
    ((P1.overall_rating - P2.overall_rating) / P2.overall_rating * 100) AS percentage_increase
FROM 
    Player AS P1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS PA1 ON P1.player_api_id = PA1.player_api_id
JOIN 
    Player AS P2 ON P2.player_api_id = PA1.player_api_id
WHERE 
    P1.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk' AND P2.player_name = 'Paulin Puel';

SELECT 
    ((SELECT overall_rating FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T1.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk') 
     - 
     (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T1.player_name = 'Paulin Puel')) / 
    (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T1.player_name = 'Paulin Puel') * 100 AS percentage_increase;

SELECT 
    ((SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes JOIN Player ON Player_Attributes.player_api_id = Player.player_api_id WHERE Player.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1) 
     - 
     (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes JOIN Player ON Player_Attributes.player_api_id = Player.player_api_id WHERE Player.player_name = 'Paulin Puel' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1)) * 100 /
    (SELECT overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes JOIN Player ON Player_Attributes.player_api_id = Player.player_api_id WHERE Player.player_name = 'Paulin Puel' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1) AS percentage_increase;

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk' THEN T2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END) 
      - SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Paulin Puel' THEN T2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END)) 
     / SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Paulin Puel' THEN T2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS percentage_increase
FROM 
    Player AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2
ON 
    T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id;

JOIN Team_Attributes AS T3 ON T2.team_api_id = T3.team_api_id AND T1.date LIKE '2010-02-22%'
WHERE T2.team_long_name = 'FC Lorient'

JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.away_team_api_id
JOIN Team_Attributes AS T3 ON T1.team_api_id = T3.team_api_id
WHERE T1.team_long_name = 'FC Lorient' AND T2.date LIKE '2010-02-22%'

WHERE T1.team_long_name = 'FC Lorient' AND T2.date LIKE '2010-02-22%'

SELECT T3.buildUpPlayPassingClass
FROM Team AS T1
JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.team_api_id = T2.away_team_api_id OR T1.team_api_id = T2.home_team_api_id
JOIN Team_Attributes AS T3 ON T1.team_api_id = T3.team_api_id AND T2.date LIKE '2010-02-22%'
WHERE T1.team_long_name = 'FC Lorient'

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN T1.buildUpPlayPassingClass IS NOT NULL THEN T1.buildUpPlayPassingClass
        WHEN T2.buildUpPlayPassingClass IS NOT NULL THEN T2.buildUpPlayPassingClass
    END AS buildUpPlayPassingClass
FROM 
    Team_Attributes AS T1
JOIN 
    Match AS M ON T1.team_api_id = M.home_team_api_id AND M.date LIKE '2010-02-22%'
LEFT JOIN 
    Team_Attributes AS T2 ON T2.team_api_id = M.away_team_api_id AND M.date LIKE '2010-02-22%'
JOIN 
    Team AS T ON (T1.team_api_id = M.home_team_api_id OR T2.team_api_id = M.away_team_api_id)
WHERE 
    T.team_long_name = 'FC Lorient'

1115:
SELECT 
    ((T2.overall_rating - T3.overall_rating) / T2.overall_rating * 100) AS percentage_increase
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id AND T2.date = '2013-07-12'
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T3 ON T1.player_api_id = T3.player_api_id AND T3.date = '2013-07-12'
WHERE 
    T1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' OR T1.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery';

SELECT 
    ((T2.overall_rating - T4.overall_rating) / T2.overall_rating) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
JOIN 
    Player AS T3 ON T3.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T4 ON T3.player_api_id = T4.player_api_id
WHERE 
    T2.date = '2013-07-12' AND T4.date = '2013-07-12'
    AND T1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' AND T3.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery';

SELECT CAST((T2.overall_rating - T3.overall_rating) AS REAL) * 100 / T2.overall_rating AS percentage_difference
FROM Player AS T1
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T3 ON T1.player_api_id = T3.player_api_id
WHERE T2.date = '2013-07-12' AND T1.player_name IN ('Landon Donovan', 'Jordan Bowery')

SELECT 
    ((T2.overall_rating - T3.overall_rating) / T2.overall_rating) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
LEFT JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T3 ON T1.player_api_id <> T3.player_api_id AND T2.date = T3.date
WHERE 
    T2.date = '2013-07-12' 
    AND (T1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' OR T1.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery')
GROUP BY 
    T2.overall_rating, T3.overall_rating;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T2.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' THEN T1.overall_rating ELSE 0 END) AS landon_donovan_rating,
    SUM(CASE WHEN T2.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery' THEN T1.overall_rating ELSE 0 END) AS jordan_bowery_rating
FROM 
    Player_Attributes AS T1
JOIN 
    Player AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE 
    T1.date = '2013-07-12';

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' THEN T2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END) -
     SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery' THEN T2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END)) /
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' THEN T2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE 
    T2.date = '2013-07-12';

SELECT 
    ((P1.overall_rating - P2.overall_rating) / P1.overall_rating * 100) AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    Player AS P1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS PA1 ON P1.player_api_id = PA1.player_api_id
JOIN 
    Player AS P2 ON P2.player_api_id = PA2.player_api_id
WHERE 
    P1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' AND PA1.date = '2013-07-12'
AND
    P2.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery' AND PA2.date = '2013-07-12';

895:
SELECT AVG(lapTimes.milliseconds) AS avg_lap_time
FROM drivers
JOIN results ON drivers.driverid = results.driverid
JOIN races ON results.raceid = races.raceid
JOIN lapTimes ON results.driverid = lapTimes.driverid AND results.raceid = lapTimes.raceid
WHERE drivers.forename = 'Lewis' AND drivers.surname = 'Hamilton' AND races.name = 'Malaysian Grand Prix' AND races.year = 2009;

SELECT AVG(laptimes.milliseconds) AS average_lap_time
FROM drivers
JOIN results ON drivers.driverid = results.driverid
JOIN races ON results.raceid = races.raceid
JOIN laptimes ON races.raceid = laptimes.raceid
WHERE drivers.forename = 'Lewis'
AND drivers.surname = 'Hamilton'
AND races.name = 'Malaysian Grand Prix'
AND races.year = 2009;

SELECT AVG(laps.milliseconds) AS average_lap_time
FROM drivers
JOIN results ON drivers.driverid = results.driverid
JOIN laps ON results.resultid = laps.resultid
JOIN races ON laps.raceid = races.raceid
WHERE drivers.forename = 'Lewis' AND drivers.surname = 'Hamilton'
AND races.name = 'Malaysian Grand Prix' AND races.year = 2009;

SELECT AVG(laptimes.milliseconds)
FROM drivers
JOIN results ON drivers.driverid = results.driverid
JOIN laps ON results.raceid = laps.raceid
JOIN laptimes ON laps.lapid = laptimes.lapid
WHERE drivers.forename = 'Lewis' AND drivers.surname = 'Hamilton'
AND races.name = 'Malaysian Grand Prix' AND races.year = 2009;

SELECT AVG(T4.milliseconds) AS average_lap_time
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN laps AS T3 ON T2.resultid = T3.resultid
JOIN laptimes AS T4 ON T3.raceid = T4.raceid AND T3.driverid = T4.driverid
WHERE T1.forename = 'Lewis' AND T1.surname = 'Hamilton' AND T3.raceid IN (
    SELECT raceid FROM races WHERE name = 'Malaysian Grand Prix' AND YEAR = 2009
);

SELECT AVG(laps.milliseconds) AS average_lap_time
FROM drivers
JOIN results ON drivers.driverid = results.driverid
JOIN races ON results.raceid = races.raceid
JOIN laps ON results.driverid = laps.driverid AND results.raceid = laps.raceid
WHERE drivers.forename = 'Lewis' AND drivers.surname = 'Hamilton' AND races.name = 'Malaysian Grand Prix' AND races.year = 2009;

SELECT AVG(T5.milliseconds) AS average_lap_time
FROM drivers AS T1
INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
INNER JOIN laps AS T3 ON T2.resultid = T3.resultid
INNER JOIN pitstops AS T4 ON T3.raceid = T4.raceid AND T3.driverid = T4.driverid
INNER JOIN races AS T5 ON T4.raceid = T5.raceid
WHERE T1.forename = 'Lewis' AND T1.surname = 'Hamilton' AND T5.year = 2009 AND T5.name = 'Malaysian Grand Prix';

880:
SELECT 
    ((MAX(CASE WHEN r.raceid = 853 THEN r.fastestlapspeed ELSE NULL END) - MAX(CASE WHEN r.raceid = 854 THEN r.fastestlapspeed ELSE NULL END)) / 
    MAX(CASE WHEN r.raceid = 853 THEN r.fastestlapspeed ELSE NULL END)) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    results res ON d.driverid = res.driverid
JOIN 
    races r ON res.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE 
    d.forename = 'Paul' AND d.surname = 'di Resta';

SELECT 
    ((T2.fastestlapspeed - T3.fastestlapspeed) / T2.fastestlapspeed) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    results AS T1
JOIN 
    drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN 
    results AS T3 ON T1.driverid = T3.driverid AND T1.raceid = 854
WHERE 
    T2.forename = 'Paul' 
    AND T2.surname = 'di Resta' 
    AND T1.raceid = 853;

SELECT ((T2.fastestlapspeed - T3.fastestlapspeed) / T2.fastestlapspeed * 100) AS percentage_difference
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid AND T2.raceid = 853
JOIN results AS T3 ON T1.driverid = T3.driverid AND T3.raceid = 854
WHERE T1.forename = 'Paul' AND T1.surname = 'di Resta'

SELECT 
    ((MAX(CASE WHEN T2.fastestlapspeed IS NOT NULL THEN T2.fastestlapspeed ELSE 0 END) - MAX(CASE WHEN T2.fastestlapspeed IS NOT NULL AND T1.raceid = 854 THEN T2.fastestlapspeed ELSE 0 END)) / MAX(CASE WHEN T2.fastestlapspeed IS NOT NULL THEN T2.fastestlapspeed ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    races AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
JOIN 
    drivers AS T3 ON T2.driverid = T3.driverid
WHERE 
    T3.forename = 'Paul' AND T3.surname = 'di Resta'

SELECT 
    ((MAX(CASE WHEN T2.raceId = 853 THEN T2.fastestlapspeed ELSE NULL END) - MAX(CASE WHEN T2.raceId = 854 THEN T2.fastestlapspeed ELSE NULL END)) / 
     MAX(CASE WHEN T2.raceId = 853 THEN T2.fastestlapspeed ELSE NULL END)) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    drivers AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
WHERE 
    T1.forename = 'Paul' AND T1.surname = 'di Resta' AND T2.raceid IN (853, 854);

SELECT 
    AVG(T2.fastestlapspeed) AS avg_fastest_lap_speed,
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.raceid = 853 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_853,
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.raceid = 854 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_854
FROM 
    races AS T1
JOIN 
    laptimes AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
JOIN 
    drivers AS T3 ON T2.driverid = T3.driverid
WHERE 
    T3.forename = 'Paul' AND T3.surname = 'di Resta';

SELECT 
    ((T1.fastestlapspeed - T2.fastestlapspeed) / T1.fastestlapspeed * 100) AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    results AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid AND T1.driverref = T2.driverref AND T1.number = T2.number AND T1.grid = T2.grid AND T1.position = T2.position
JOIN 
    drivers AS D ON T1.driverid = D.driverid
WHERE 
    D.forename = 'Paul' AND D.surname = 'di Resta' AND T1.raceid = 853 AND T2.raceid = 854;

SELECT r.name AS race_name, s.year AS race_year
FROM results res
JOIN lapTimes lt ON res.driverid = lt.driverid AND res.raceid = lt.raceid
JOIN races r ON res.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN seasons s ON r.year = s.year
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE d.forename = 'Michael' AND d.surname = 'Schumacher'
ORDER BY lt.milliseconds ASC
LIMIT 1;
SELECT T2.raceid, T2.year, T2.circuitid FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid WHERE T1.forename = 'Michael' AND T1.surname = 'Schumacher' ORDER BY T2.milliseconds LIMIT 1

SELECT T2.raceid, T2.year
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN laps AS T3 ON T2.resultid = T3.resultid
WHERE T1.forename = 'Michael' AND T1.surname = 'Schumacher'
ORDER BY T3.milliseconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.raceid, T2.year FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid JOIN laps AS T3 ON T2.resultid = T3.resultid WHERE T1.forename = 'Michael' AND T1.surname = 'Schumacher' ORDER BY T3.milliseconds ASC LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.raceid, r.year
FROM results AS res
JOIN drivers AS dri ON res.driverid = dri.driverid
JOIN races AS r ON res.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE LOWER(dri.forename) = 'michael' AND LOWER(dri.surname) = 'schumacher'
ORDER BY res.milliseconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.name, r.year
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes l ON d.driverid = l.driverid
JOIN races r ON l.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE d.forename = 'Michael' AND d.surname = 'Schumacher'
ORDER BY l.milliseconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.raceid, T2.year, T2.circuitid, T2.laps
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
WHERE T1.forename = 'Michael' AND T1.surname = 'Schumacher'
ORDER BY T2.milliseconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

954:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN r.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(r.driverid) AS completion_percentage
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN 
    races ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE 
    d.nationality = 'Japanese' AND
    ra.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009;

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS completion_percentage
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE T1.nationality = 'Japanese' AND T3.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009;

SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN T2.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 AS CompletionPercentage
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE T1.nationality = 'Japanese' AND T3.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009;

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.driverid) AS completion_percentage
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE T1.nationality = 'Japanese' AND T3.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS completion_percentage
FROM 
    drivers AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN 
    races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE 
    T1.nationality = 'Japanese' AND T3.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009;

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) * 100 AS completion_percentage
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
WHERE T1.nationality = 'Japanese' AND T2.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS "Completion Percentage"
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE T1.nationality = 'Japanese' AND T3.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009;
951:
SELECT COUNT(c.constructorId) AS numberOfJapaneseConstructorsWithZeroPointsInTwoRaces
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorStandings cs ON c.constructorId = cs.constructorId
GROUP BY c.constructorId
HAVING SUM(cs.points) = 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT cs.raceId) = 2;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM constructors AS c
INNER JOIN constructorStandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE c.nationality = 'Japanese'
GROUP BY c.constructorid
HAVING SUM(cs.points) = 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT cs.raceid) = 2;

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM constructors AS T1 JOIN constructorstandings AS T2 ON T1.constructorid = T2.constructorid WHERE T1.nationality = 'Japanese' GROUP BY T1.constructorid HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T1.raceid) = 2 AND SUM(T2.points) = 0;

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM constructors AS T1 JOIN constructorStandings AS T2 ON T1.constructorid = T2.constructorid WHERE T1.nationality = 'Japanese' GROUP BY T1.constructorid HAVING COUNT(T2.points) = 2 AND SUM(T2.points) = 0;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.constructorId) FROM constructors AS T1 JOIN constructorstandings AS T2 ON T1.constructorid = T2.constructorid JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid WHERE T1.nationality = 'Japanese' AND COUNT(T3.constructorId) = 2

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM constructorstandings AS T1 JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid WHERE T1.constructorid IN ( SELECT constructorid FROM constructorstandings GROUP BY constructorid HAVING SUM(points) = 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT raceid) = 2 ) AND T1.constructorid IN ( SELECT constructorid FROM constructors WHERE nationality = 'Japanese' )

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.constructorId)
FROM constructors AS T1
JOIN constructorStandings AS T2 ON T1.constructorid = T2.constructorid
JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE T1.nationality = 'Japanese'
GROUP BY T2.constructorId
HAVING COUNT(T2.points) = 2 AND SUM(T2.points) = 0;

959:
SELECT r.fastestlap
FROM driverstandings d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid AND d.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE d.year = 2009
ORDER BY d.points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.fastestlap
FROM results r
JOIN driverstandings ds ON r.driverid = ds.driverid AND r.raceid = ds.raceid
WHERE ds.wins = (SELECT MAX(wins) FROM driverstandings WHERE YEAR = 2009)
AND YEAR = 2009;

SELECT T2.fastestLapNumber
FROM driverstandings AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid AND T1.raceid = T2.raceid
WHERE T1.year = 2009
ORDER BY T2.points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.fastestLap
FROM results r
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE d.driverid = (
    SELECT ds.driverid
    FROM driverstandings ds
    JOIN seasons s ON ds.seasonid = s.seasonid
    WHERE s.year = 2009
    ORDER BY ds.wins DESC

955:
SELECT AVG((TIME_TO_SEC(T2.time) / 1000)) AS avg_time_seconds
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE T1.wins > 0 AND T3.year < 1975;

SELECT YEAR(races), AVG(TIME_TO_SEC(results.time)) AS avg_time_seconds
FROM drivers
JOIN results ON drivers.driverid = results.driverid
JOIN races ON results.raceid = races.raceid
WHERE drivers.championship = 1 AND races.year < 1975
GROUP BY YEAR(races);

SELECT AVG((TIME_TO_SEC(TIME) / 1000)) AS avg_time_seconds, YEAR(r)
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN races ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE r.status = 'Champion' AND ra.year < 1975
GROUP BY YEAR(r);

SELECT d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM r.time)) / 3600 AS avg_time_seconds
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid AND r.statusid != 1
JOIN races ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE ra.year < 1975 AND r.position = 1
GROUP BY d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname;

SELECT AVG((SUBSTR(T2.time, 1, INSTR(T2.time, ':') - 1) * 3600 + SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, ':') + 1, INSTR(T2.time, '.') - INSTR(T2.time, ':') - 1) * 60 + SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, '.') + 1) / 1000)) AS avg_time_in_seconds FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.resultid = T3.resultid WHERE T3.year < 1975 AND T2.position = 1;

SELECT AVG(CAST(SUBSTR(TIME, 1, INSTR(TIME, ':') - 1) AS INT) * 3600 + 
           CAST(SUBSTR(TIME, INSTR(TIME, ':') + 1, INSTR(TIME, '.') - INSTR(TIME, ':') - 1) AS INT) * 60 +
           CAST(SUBSTR(TIME, INSTR(TIME, '.') + 1) AS INT) / 1000) AS avg_time_seconds
FROM results
JOIN driverstandings ON results.driverid = driverstandings.driverid AND results.raceid = driverstandings.raceid
WHERE driverid IN (
    SELECT driverid
    FROM driverstandings
    GROUP BY driverid
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
AND YEAR < 1975;

SELECT AVG((SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, ':') + 1, 2) * 60 + SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, ':') + 4, 2)) * 60 + SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, '.') + 1, 3)) AS avg_time_seconds, T3.year
FROM drivers AS T1
INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
INNER JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE T3.year < 1975 AND T2.position = 1
GROUP BY T3.year;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.laps > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM 
    results AS T1
JOIN 
    drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
WHERE 
    T1.year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005
    AND YEAR(T2.dob) < 1985;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.laps > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) * 100 AS percentage
FROM 
    drivers AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN 
    laps AS T3 ON T2.resultid = T3.resultid
WHERE 
    T1.dob < '1985-01-01' 
    AND T2.date BETWEEN '2000-01-01' AND '2005-12-31'

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.year < 1985 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM results AS T1
JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN races AS T3 ON T1.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE T1.laps > 50 AND T3.year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005;

INNER JOIN 
    laps AS T3 ON T2.resultid = T3.resultid

    T2.year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005;

JOIN laps AS T3 ON T1.resultid = T3.resultid

SELECT 
    YEAR(q.qualificationId) AS first_qualifying_year,
    r.name AS race_name,
    r.date AS race_date,
    r.time AS race_time
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    qualifying q ON d.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN 
    races r ON q.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE 
    d.dob = (SELECT MIN(dob) FROM drivers)
ORDER BY 
    q.date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, q.date, q.time
FROM drivers d
JOIN qualifying q ON d.driverid = q.driverid
WHERE q.date = (SELECT MIN(date) FROM qualifying);

SELECT 
    r.year,
    r.name,
    r.date,
    r.time
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    qualifying q ON d.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN 
    races r ON q.raceid = r.raceid
ORDER BY 
    d.dob ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    d.driverid, 
    d.forename, 
    d.surname, 
    r.year, 
    r.date, 
    r.time
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    qualifying q ON d.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN 
    races r ON q.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE 
    q.position = 1 -- Assuming the first qualifying position is 1
ORDER BY 
    d.dob DESC -- Larger dob means younger driver
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    r.year,
    r.date,
    r.time
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    qualifying q ON d.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN 
    races r ON q.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE 
    d.driverid = (
        SELECT 
            driverid 
        FROM 
            drivers 
        ORDER BY 
            dob ASC 
        LIMIT 1
    )
ORDER BY 
    q.position ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    r.year,
    r.date,
    r.time
FROM 
    races r
JOIN 
    qualifying q ON r.raceid = q.raceid AND q.driverid = (
        SELECT 
            driverid 
        FROM 
            drivers 
        WHERE 
            dob = (
                SELECT 
                    MIN(dob) 
                FROM 
                    drivers
            )
    )
ORDER BY 
    r.date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T3.year, T3.date, T3.time
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN qualifying AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
ORDER BY T1.dob ASC
LIMIT 1;
