944:
SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN r.position = 1 THEN r.milliseconds ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN r.position = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) - 
     (SUM(CASE WHEN r.position = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM results WHERE raceid = r.raceid) THEN r.milliseconds ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN r.position = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM results WHERE raceid = r.raceid) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END))) * 100 / 
     SUM(CASE WHEN r.position = 1 THEN r.milliseconds ELSE 0 END) AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    results r
JOIN 
    races ON r.raceid = races.raceid
WHERE 
    races.year = 2008 AND races.name = 'Australian Grand Prix';

SELECT 
    ((MAX(T1.time) - T1.time) / T1.time * 100) AS percentage_increase
FROM 
    results AS T1
JOIN 
    drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN 
    races AS T3 ON T1.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE 
    T3.year = 2008 AND T3.name = 'Australian Grand Prix';

SELECT 
    ((TIME_TO_SEC(T2.time) - TIME_TO_SEC(T3.time)) / TIME_TO_SEC(T2.time)) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    races AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid AND T2.position = 1 -- Champion
JOIN 
    results AS T3 ON T1.raceid = T3.raceid AND T3.position = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM results WHERE raceid = T1.raceid) -- Last place
WHERE 
    T1.year = 2008 AND T1.name = 'Australian Grand Prix';

SELECT 
    D1.driverid AS champion_id,
    D2.driverid AS last_place_id,
    (CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(T1.time, INSTR(T1.time, ':') + 1), '.', '') AS REAL) / 1000 - CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTR(T1.time, INSTR(T1.time, ':') + 1), '.', '') AS REAL)) * 100 AS percentage_improvement
FROM 
    results AS T1
JOIN 
    drivers AS D1 ON T1.driverid = D1.driverid AND T1.points = (SELECT MAX(points) FROM results WHERE YEAR = 2008 AND raceid = (SELECT raceid FROM races WHERE YEAR = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix'))
JOIN 
    drivers AS D2 ON T1.driverid = D2.driverid AND T1.position = (SELECT MIN(position) FROM results WHERE YEAR = 2008 AND raceid = (SELECT raceid FROM races WHERE YEAR = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix'))
WHERE 
    T1.year = 2008 AND T1.raceid = (SELECT raceid FROM races WHERE YEAR = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix')

SELECT 
    ((CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, 1, INSTR(T1.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 3600 + 
     CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, INSTR(T1.time, ':') + 1, INSTR(T1.time, '.') - INSTR(T1.time, ':')) AS REAL) * 60 + 
     CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, INSTR(T1.time, '.') + 1) AS REAL)) / 1000 - 
    ((CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, 1, INSTR(T1.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 3600 + 
     CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, INSTR(T1.time, ':') + 1, INSTR(T1.time, '.') - INSTR(T1.time, ':')) AS REAL) * 60 + 
     CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, INSTR(T1.time, '.') + 1) AS REAL)) / 1000) * 100
FROM 
    results AS T1
JOIN 
    races AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
WHERE 
    T2.year = 2008 AND T2.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' AND T1.position IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    T1.position ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    ((CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, 1, INSTR(T2.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60 * 60 +
     CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, ':') + 1, INSTR(T2.time, '.') - INSTR(T2.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60 +
     CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, '.') + 1) AS REAL)) / 1000 -
    
    ((CAST(SUBSTR(T4.time, 1, INSTR(T4.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60 * 60 +
     CAST(SUBSTR(T4.time, INSTR(T4.time, ':') + 1, INSTR(T4.time, '.') - INSTR(T4.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60 +
     CAST(SUBSTR(T4.time, INSTR(T4.time, '.') + 1) AS REAL)) / 1000) *
    
    100 /
    
    ((CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, 1, INSTR(T2.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60 * 60 +
     CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, ':') + 1, INSTR(T2.time, '.') - INSTR(T2.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60 +
     CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, '.') + 1) AS REAL)) / 1000)
AS 
    percentage_difference
FROM 
    races AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
JOIN 
    drivers AS T3 ON T2.driverid = T3.driverid
LEFT JOIN 
    results AS T4 ON T1.raceid = T4.raceid AND T4.position = 1 -- Assuming the champion is always at position 1
WHERE 
    T1.year = 2008
    AND T1.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
    AND T2.time IS NOT NULL
    AND T4.time IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
    ((CAST(SUBSTR(time_champion, 1, INSTR(time_champion, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60 * 60 +
     CAST(SUBSTR(time_champion, INSTR(time_champion, ':'), INSTR(time_champion, ':', 1, 2) - INSTR(time_champion, ':')) AS REAL) * 60 +
     CAST(SUBSTR(time_champion, INSTR(time_champion, ':', 1, 2)) AS REAL)) -
    ((CAST(SUBSTR(time_last_place, 1, INSTR(time_last_place, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60 * 60 +
     CAST(SUBSTR(time_last_place, INSTR(time_last_place, ':'), INSTR(time_last_place, ':', 1, 2) - INSTR(time_last_place, ':')) AS REAL) * 60 +
     CAST(SUBSTR(time_last_place, INSTR(time_last_place, ':', 1, 2)) AS REAL))) /
  (CAST(SUBSTR(time_last_place, 1, INSTR(time_last_place, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60 * 60 +
   CAST(SUBSTR(time_last_place, INSTR(time_last_place, ':'), INSTR(time_last_place, ':', 1, 2) - INSTR(time_last_place, ':')) AS REAL) * 60 +
   CAST(SUBSTR(time_last_place, INSTR(time_last_place, ':', 1, 2)) AS REAL)) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM (
    SELECT time FROM results WHERE raceid IN (SELECT raceid FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix') AND driverid IN (SELECT driverid FROM driverstandings WHERE raceid IN (SELECT raceid FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix') AND position = 1)
) AS time_champion,
(
    SELECT time FROM results WHERE raceid IN (SELECT raceid FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix') AND driverid IN (SELECT driverid FROM results WHERE raceid IN (SELECT raceid FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix') ORDER BY position DESC LIMIT 1)
) AS time_last_place;

JOIN results ON drivers.driverid = results.driverid
WHERE drivers.nationality = 'German' AND YEAR(drivers.dob) BETWEEN 1980 AND 1985
GROUP BY drivers.driverid
ORDER BY AVG(pitstops.duration) ASC
LIMIT 3

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, AVG(ps.duration) AS avg_duration
FROM drivers d
JOIN pitstops ps ON d.driverid = ps.driverid
JOIN races r ON ps.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE d.nationality = 'German' AND YEAR(d.dob) BETWEEN 1980 AND 1985
GROUP BY d.driverid
ORDER BY avg_duration ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, AVG(ps.duration) AS avg_duration
FROM drivers d
JOIN pitstops ps ON d.driverid = ps.driverid
JOIN races r ON ps.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE d.nationality = 'German' AND YEAR(d.dob) BETWEEN 1980 AND 1985
GROUP BY d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY avg_duration ASC
LIMIT 3;
989:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname, r.time
FROM races AS r
JOIN results AS res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers AS d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE r.year = 2008 AND r.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
ORDER BY res.points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, r.time
FROM drivers d
JOIN driverstandings ds ON d.driverid = ds.driverid
JOIN results r ON ds.driverid = r.driverid AND ds.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE ds.position = 1 AND r.raceid IN (
    SELECT raceid FROM races WHERE name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND YEAR = 2008
)

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, r.time
FROM races AS r
JOIN results AS res ON r.raceid = res.raceid
JOIN drivers AS d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE r.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND r.year = 2008 AND res.position = 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, r.time
FROM results r
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN races ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE ra.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND ra.year = 2008 AND r.position = (
    SELECT MAX(position)
    FROM results
    WHERE raceid = ra.raceid
);

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, r.time
FROM results r
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN races ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN circuits ci ON ra.circuitid = ci.circuitid
WHERE ra.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND ra.year = 2008 AND r.position = 1;

SELECT r.time
FROM results r
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE r.raceid = (
    SELECT raceid
    FROM races
    WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
)
ORDER BY r.position ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT TIME FROM results WHERE driverId = ( SELECT driverId FROM results WHERE raceId = ( SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND YEAR = 2008 ) ORDER BY position ASC LIMIT 1 ) AND raceId = ( SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND YEAR = 2008 );
990:
SELECT c.constructorRef, c.url
FROM constructorStandings cs
JOIN races r ON cs.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN constructors c ON cs.constructorid = c.constructorid
WHERE r.year = 2009 AND r.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix'
ORDER BY cs.points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.constructorref, c.url 
FROM constructors AS c 
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid 
JOIN races AS r ON cs.raceid = r.raceid 
WHERE r.year = 2009 AND r.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix' 
AND cs.points = (SELECT MAX(points) FROM constructorstandings WHERE raceid = cs.raceid);

SELECT c.constructorRef, c.url
FROM constructors c
JOIN constructorResults cr ON c.constructorId = cr.constructorId
JOIN races r ON cr.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year = 2009 AND r.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix'
ORDER BY cr.points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.constructorref, c.url
FROM constructors AS c
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
JOIN results AS r ON cs.constructorid = r.constructorid
JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE ra.year = 2009 AND ra.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix'
ORDER BY cs.points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.constructorRef, c.url
FROM races AS r
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON r.raceid = cs.raceid
JOIN constructors AS c ON cs.constructorid = c.constructorid
WHERE r.year = 2009 AND r.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix'
ORDER BY cs.points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.constructorRef, c.url
FROM constructors AS c
JOIN constructorStandings AS cs ON c.constructorId = cs.constructorId
JOIN races AS r ON cs.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year = 2009 AND r.name = 'Singapore Grand Prix'
ORDER BY cs.points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T3.constructorref, T3.url FROM races AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid JOIN constructors AS T3 ON T2.constructorid = T3.constructorid WHERE T1.year = 2009 AND T1.circuitref = 'singapore' AND T2.points = ( SELECT MAX(points) FROM results WHERE raceid = T1.raceid )
994:
SELECT c.constructorid, c.name, c.nationality, SUM(cr.points) as total_points
FROM constructorresults cr
JOIN races r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN constructors c ON cr.constructorid = c.constructorid
WHERE r.round = 1 AND r.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010 AND r.country = 'Monaco'
GROUP BY c.constructorid, c.name, c.nationality
ORDER BY total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT SUM(cr.points) AS total_points, c.name, c.nationality
FROM races r
JOIN constructorResults cr ON r.raceid = cr.raceid
JOIN constructors c ON cr.constructorid = c.constructorid
WHERE r.country = 'Monaco' AND r.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
GROUP BY cr.constructorid
ORDER BY total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.constructorid, c.name, c.nationality, SUM(cs.points) as total_points
FROM constructors AS c
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
JOIN races AS r ON cs.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE r.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010 AND r.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix'
GROUP BY c.constructorid
ORDER BY total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT SUM(constructorStandings.points), constructors.name, constructors.nationality
FROM races
JOIN constructorStandings ON races.raceId = constructorStandings.raceId
JOIN constructors ON constructorStandings.constructorId = constructors.constructorId
WHERE races.circuitName = 'Monaco Grand Prix' AND races.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
GROUP BY constructors.constructorId
ORDER BY SUM(constructorStandings.points) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT SUM(cr.points) AS total_points, c.name, c.nationality
FROM races r
JOIN constructorResults cr ON r.raceid = cr.raceid
JOIN constructors c ON cr.constructorid = c.constructorid
WHERE r.circuitid IN (
    SELECT circuitid FROM circuits WHERE name = 'Monaco'
) AND r.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
GROUP BY cr.constructorid
ORDER BY total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT SUM(T2.points), T3.name, T3.nationality FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN constructorStandings AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid INNER JOIN constructors AS T3 ON T2.constructorid = T3.constructorid WHERE T1.circuitref = 'monaco' AND T1.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010 GROUP BY T2.constructorid ORDER BY SUM(T2.points) DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT ConstructorID, Name, Nationality, SUM(Points)
FROM constructorstandings AS T1
JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
WHERE T2.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix' AND T2.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
GROUP BY ConstructorID, Name, Nationality
ORDER BY SUM(Points) DESC
LIMIT 1;
1002:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, r.name AS first_race_name
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
ORDER BY d.dob DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, r.name AS first_race_name
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
ORDER BY d.dob ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, r.name AS first_race_name
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
WHERE d.dob = (SELECT MIN(dob) FROM drivers);

SELECT d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS fullName, d.nationality, r.name AS firstRaceName
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
WHERE d.dob = (SELECT MAX(dob) FROM drivers)
ORDER BY r.date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, r.name
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
ORDER BY d.dob DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname, T1.nationality, T3.name
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
ORDER BY T1.dob ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT DISTINCT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, r.name
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN races ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE d.dob = (SELECT MIN(dob) FROM drivers);
1001:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN qualifying q ON d.driverid = q.driverid
JOIN races r ON q.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
WHERE r.year = 2008 AND r.round = 3 AND c.name = 'Marina Bay Street' AND q.position = 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
INNER JOIN qualifying q ON d.driverid = q.driverid AND q.position = 1
INNER JOIN races r ON q.raceid = r.raceid
INNER JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
WHERE r.year = 2008 AND c.name = 'Marina Bay Street'

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN qualifying q ON d.driverid = q.driverid AND q.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN races r ON q.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE r.year = 2008 AND r.round = 3 AND q.q3 IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY q.q3 ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM circuits c
JOIN qualifying q ON c.circuitid = q.circuitid
JOIN drivers d ON q.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE c.name = 'Marina Bay Street Circuit'
AND q.position = 3
AND q.year = 2008;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM qualifying q
JOIN races r ON q.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
JOIN drivers d ON q.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE r.year = 2008 AND c.name = 'Marina Bay Street' AND q.q3 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY q.q3 ASC LIMIT 1;

SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN qualifying AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid JOIN circuits AS T3 ON T2.circuitid = T3.circuitid WHERE T2.year = 2008 AND T2.round = 3 AND T3.name = 'Marina Bay Street'

SELECT T3.forename, T3.surname FROM qualifying AS T1 JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T1.driverid = T3.driverid WHERE T1.q3 = '1' AND T2.name = 'Marina Bay Street Circuit' AND T2.year = 2008 ORDER BY T1.q3 DESC LIMIT 1
1011:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes lt ON d.driverid = lt.driverid
WHERE lt.time = (SELECT MIN(lt2.time) FROM lapTimes lt2)
LIMIT 20;

SELECT forename, surname, TIME 
FROM lapTimes 
ORDER BY TIME ASC 
LIMIT 20;
SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN laptimes AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid ORDER BY T2.time ASC LIMIT 20

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes l ON d.driverId = l.driverId
WHERE TIME_TO_SEC(l.time) = (
    SELECT MIN(TIME_TO_SEC(time))
    FROM lapTimes
)
LIMIT 20;
SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN laptimes AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid WHERE T2.time IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T2.time ASC LIMIT 20;
SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN laptimes AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid ORDER BY T2.time ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN lapTimes lt ON d.driverId = lt.driverId
JOIN races r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE lt.time = (
    SELECT MIN(lt2.time)
    FROM lapTimes lt2
    WHERE lt2.driverId = d.driverId AND lt2.raceId = r.raceId
)
ORDER BY lt.time ASC
LIMIT 20;
719:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM hero_power AS hp
JOIN superpower AS sp ON hp.power_id = sp.id
JOIN superhero AS s ON hp.hero_id = s.id
WHERE sp.power_name = 'Super Strength' AND s.height_cm > 200;

SELECT COUNT(superhero.id)
FROM superhero
JOIN hero_power ON superhero.id = hero_power.hero_id
JOIN superpower ON hero_power.power_id = superpower.id
WHERE superpower.power_name = 'Super Strength' AND superhero.height_cm > 200;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM hero_power AS T1 
JOIN superpower AS T2 ON T1.power_id = T2.id 
JOIN superhero AS T3 ON T1.hero_id = T3.id 
WHERE T2.power_name = 'Super Strength' AND T3.height_cm > 200;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.superhero_id) FROM superhero AS T1 JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T2.power_id = T3.id WHERE T3.power_name = 'Super Strength' AND T1.height_cm > 200;

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM hero_power AS hp
JOIN superpower AS sp ON hp.power_id = sp.id
JOIN superhero AS s ON hp.hero_id = s.id
WHERE sp.power_name = 'Super Strength' AND s.height_cm > 200;

SELECT COUNT(T1.id)
FROM superhero AS T1
JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id
JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T2.power_id = T3.id
WHERE T3.power_name = 'Super Strength' AND T1.height_cm > 200;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T2.power_id = T3.id WHERE T3.power_name = 'Super Strength' AND T1.height_cm > 200
1003:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS accident_count
FROM results r
JOIN status s ON r.statusid = s.statusid
JOIN races ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE ra.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND s.status = 'Accident'
GROUP BY r.driverid
ORDER BY accident_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS accident_count
FROM results r
JOIN status s ON r.statusid = s.statusid
JOIN races rr ON r.raceid = rr.raceid
WHERE rr.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND s.status = 'Accident'
GROUP BY r.driverid
ORDER BY accident_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM races AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T2.driverid = T3.driverid
JOIN status AS T4 ON T2.statusid = T4.statusid
WHERE T1.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
AND T4.status = 'Accident';

SELECT d.driverId, COUNT(r.resultId) AS num_accidents
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
JOIN status s ON r.statusId = s.statusId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND s.statusid = 3
GROUP BY d.driverId
ORDER BY num_accidents DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(results.resultid) FROM results JOIN status ON results.statusid = status.statusid WHERE results.raceid IN (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE name = 'Canadian Grand Prix') AND status.status = 'Accident' GROUP BY results.driverid ORDER BY COUNT(results.resultid) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT d.driverId, COUNT(r.resultId) AS num_accidents
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
JOIN status s ON r.statusId = s.statusId
WHERE r.raceId IN (
    SELECT raceId
    FROM races
    WHERE name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
)
AND s.status = 'Accident'
GROUP BY d.driverId
ORDER BY num_accidents DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.driverid, COUNT(r.resultid) AS accident_count
FROM results r
JOIN races ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
WHERE ra.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND r.statusid = 3
GROUP BY r.driverid
ORDER BY accident_count DESC
LIMIT 1;
1014: SELECT T1.driverid, T1.time, T1.milliseconds FROM laptimes AS T1 JOIN circuits AS T2 ON T1.circuitid = T2.circuitid WHERE T2.country = 'Italy' ORDER BY T1.milliseconds ASC;

SELECT DISTINCT l.time
FROM laptimes AS l
JOIN races AS r ON l.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
WHERE c.country = 'Italy';

SELECT r.fastestlaptime, c.name AS circuit_name, d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driver_name
FROM results r
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
ORDER BY r.fastestlaptime DESC;
SELECT DISTINCT T2.time FROM circuits AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.circuitid = T2.circuitid JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T2.driverid = T3.driverid WHERE T1.country = 'Italy'

SELECT DISTINCT l.time
FROM laps l
JOIN races r ON l.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
ORDER BY l.time ASC;

SELECT T2.driverid, T2.driverref, T2.number, T1.time, MIN(T3.milliseconds)
FROM results AS T1
JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN laps AS T3 ON T1.raceid = T3.raceid
JOIN circuits AS T4 ON T1.circuitid = T4.circuitid
WHERE T4.country = 'Italy'
GROUP BY T2.driverid;

SELECT DISTINCT l.driverid, d.forename, d.surname, l.time, l.milliseconds
FROM laptimes l
JOIN results r ON l.raceid = r.raceid AND l.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN races ra ON l.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN circuits c ON ra.circuitid = c.circuitid
JOIN drivers d ON l.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN status s ON r.statusid = s.statusid
WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
ORDER BY l.time;
724:
SELECT s.superhero_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN colour c_eye ON s.eye_colour_id = c_eye.id AND c_eye.colour = 'Blue'
JOIN colour c_hair ON s.hair_colour_id = c_hair.id AND c_hair.colour = 'Blond';

SELECT s.superhero_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN colour c_eye ON s.eye_colour_id = c_eye.id AND c_eye.colour = 'Blue'
JOIN colour c_hair ON s.hair_colour_id = c_hair.id AND c_hair.colour = 'Blond';

SELECT s.superhero_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN colour c_eye ON s.eye_colour_id = c_eye.id AND c_eye.colour = 'Blue'
JOIN colour c_hair ON s.hair_colour_id = c_hair.id AND c_hair.colour = 'Blond'
WHERE s.alignment_id IN (
    SELECT a.id
    FROM alignment a
    WHERE a.alignment = 'Good'
)
SELECT T1.superhero_name FROM superhero AS T1 JOIN colour AS T2 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T2.id JOIN colour AS T3 ON T1.hair_colour_id = T3.id WHERE T2.colour = 'Blue' AND T3.colour = 'Blond'

SELECT s.superhero_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN colour c_eye ON s.eye_colour_id = c_eye.id AND c_eye.colour = 'Blue'
JOIN colour c_hair ON s.hair_colour_id = c_hair.id AND c_hair.colour = 'Blond'
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id AND a.alignment != 'Evil'

SELECT DISTINCT s.superhero_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN colour c_eye ON s.eye_colour_id = c_eye.id AND c_eye.colour = 'Blue'
JOIN colour c_hair ON s.hair_colour_id = c_hair.id AND c_hair.colour = 'Blond'

SELECT T1.superhero_name
FROM superhero AS T1
JOIN colour AS T2 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T2.id
JOIN colour AS T3 ON T1.hair_colour_id = T3.id
WHERE T2.colour = 'Blue' AND T3.colour = 'Blond';
723:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM superhero AS s
JOIN colour AS c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id
JOIN hero_power AS hp ON s.id = hp.hero_id
JOIN superpower AS sp ON hp.power_id = sp.id
WHERE c.colour = 'Blue' AND sp.power_name = 'Agility';

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM superhero AS s
JOIN colour AS c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id AND c.colour = 'Blue'
JOIN hero_power AS hp ON s.id = hp.hero_id
JOIN superpower AS sp ON hp.power_id = sp.id AND sp.power_name = 'Agility';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM superhero AS T1 
INNER JOIN colour AS T2 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T2.id 
INNER JOIN hero_power AS T3 ON T1.id = T3.hero_id 
INNER JOIN superpower AS T4 ON T3.power_id = T4.id 
WHERE T2.colour = 'Blue' AND T4.power_name = 'Agility';

SELECT COUNT(superhero.id)
FROM superhero
JOIN hero_power ON superhero.id = hero_power.hero_id
JOIN superpower ON hero_power.power_id = superpower.id
JOIN colour ON superhero.eye_colour_id = colour.id
WHERE colour.colour = 'Blue' AND superpower.power_name = 'Agility';

SELECT COUNT(superhero.id)
FROM superhero
JOIN colour ON superhero.eye_colour_id = colour.id
JOIN hero_power ON superhero.id = hero_power.hero_id
JOIN superpower ON hero_power.power_id = superpower.id
WHERE colour.colour = 'Blue'
AND superpower.power_name = 'Agility';

SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_superheroes_with_blue_eyes_and_agility
FROM superhero
JOIN colour ON superhero.eye_colour_id = colour.id AND colour.colour = 'Blue'
JOIN hero_power ON superhero.id = hero_power.hero_id
JOIN superpower ON hero_power.power_id = superpower.id AND superpower.power_name = 'Agility';

SELECT COUNT(T1.id)
FROM superhero AS T1
JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id
JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T2.power_id = T3.id
JOIN colour AS T4 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T4.id
WHERE T4.colour = 'Blue' AND T3.power_name = 'Agility';
726:
SELECT s.superhero_name, s.height_cm
FROM superhero s
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
ORDER BY s.height_cm DESC;

SELECT s.superhero_name, s.height_cm
FROM superhero s
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
ORDER BY s.height_cm DESC;

SELECT s.superhero_name, s.height_cm
FROM superhero AS s
JOIN publisher AS p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
ORDER BY s.height_cm DESC;

SELECT T1.superhero_name, T1.height_cm
FROM superhero AS T1
JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id
WHERE T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
ORDER BY T1.height_cm DESC;
SELECT DISTINCT T1.superhero_name FROM superhero AS T1 JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id WHERE T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' ORDER BY T1.height_cm DESC;

SELECT s.superhero_name, s.height_cm
FROM superhero s
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
ORDER BY s.height_cm DESC;

SELECT superhero_name, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY height_cm DESC) AS rank
FROM superhero
JOIN publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id
WHERE publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';
728:
SELECT T2.colour, COUNT(T1.id) AS count
FROM superhero AS T1
JOIN colour AS T2 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T2.id
JOIN publisher AS T3 ON T1.publisher_id = T3.id
WHERE T3.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
GROUP BY T2.colour
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.colour, COUNT(s.id) AS count
FROM superhero s
JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
GROUP BY c.colour
ORDER BY count DESC;

SELECT c.colour, COUNT(s.id) AS count
FROM superhero s
JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
GROUP BY c.colour
ORDER BY count DESC;

SELECT T2.colour, COUNT(T1.id) AS count
FROM superhero AS T1
JOIN colour AS T2 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T2.id
JOIN publisher AS T3 ON T1.publisher_id = T3.id
WHERE T3.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
GROUP BY T2.colour
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT c.colour, COUNT(s.id) AS superhero_count
FROM superhero s
JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id
WHERE s.publisher_id IN (
    SELECT p.id
    FROM publisher p
    WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
)
GROUP BY c.colour
ORDER BY superhero_count DESC;

SELECT T2.colour, COUNT(T1.id) AS count
FROM superhero AS T1
JOIN colour AS T2 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T2.id
WHERE T1.publisher_id IN (
    SELECT id FROM publisher WHERE publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
)
GROUP BY T2.colour
ORDER BY count DESC;

SELECT T2.colour, COUNT(T1.id) AS count
FROM superhero AS T1

743:
SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100) / COUNT(T1.id)) AS percentage_bad_alignment,
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' AND T3.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS marvel_bad_alignment_count
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    alignment AS T2 ON T1.alignment_id = T2.id
JOIN 
    publisher AS T3 ON T1.publisher_id = T3.id;

SELECT 
    ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(T1.id)), 2) AS percentage_bad_alignment,
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count_bad_alignment
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id
WHERE 
    T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.id) AS percentage_bad_alignment,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' AND T3.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS count_marvel_bad_alignment
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    alignment AS T2 ON T1.alignment_id = T2.id
JOIN 
    publisher AS T3 ON T1.publisher_id = T3.id

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / COUNT(T1.id)) AS percentage_bad_alignments,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' AND T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS marvel_marvels
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(T1.id)) * 100 AS percentage_bad,
    SUM(CASE WHEN T3.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' AND T1.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count_marvel_bad
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    alignment AS T2 ON T1.alignment_id = T2.id
JOIN 
    publisher AS T3 ON T1.publisher_id = T3.id

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.id) AS percentage_bad,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' AND T1.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS count_marvel_bad
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    alignment AS T2 ON T1.alignment_id = T2.id
JOIN 
    publisher AS T3 ON T1.publisher_id = T3.id
WHERE 
    T1.alignment = 'Bad'

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(T1.id)) * 100 AS percentage_bad_alignments,
    COUNT(*) AS total_marvel_superheroes
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id
WHERE 
    T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';

WITH male_superheroes AS (
    SELECT s.superhero_name
    FROM superhero s
    JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
    WHERE g.gender = 'Male'
),
average_weight AS (
    SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.79) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY weight_kg) OVER () AS avg_79_percentile
    FROM superhero
)
SELECT ms.superhero_name
FROM male_superheroes ms
JOIN average_weight aw ON true
WHERE ms.superhero_name IN (
    SELECT s.superhero_name
    FROM superhero s
    WHERE s.weight_kg > aw.avg_79_percentile
);

SELECT COUNT(*) AS number_of_heroes_with_max_strength
FROM hero_attribute ha
JOIN attribute a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id
WHERE a.attribute_name = 'Strength'
AND ha.attribute_value = (SELECT MAX(attribute_value) FROM hero_attribute WHERE attribute_id = (SELECT id FROM attribute WHERE attribute_name = 'Strength'));

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM hero_attribute AS T1 
JOIN attribute AS T2 ON T1.attribute_id = T2.id 
WHERE T2.attribute_name = 'Strength' 
AND T1.attribute_value = (SELECT MAX(attribute_value) FROM hero_attribute AS T1 JOIN attribute AS T2 ON T1.attribute_id = T2.id WHERE T2.attribute_name = 'Strength');

SELECT COUNT(hero_id) FROM hero_attribute AS T1 JOIN attribute AS T2 ON T1.attribute_id = T2.id WHERE attribute_name = 'Strength' AND attribute_value = ( SELECT MAX(attribute_value) FROM hero_attribute AS T1 JOIN attribute AS T2 ON T1.attribute_id = T2.id WHERE T2.attribute_name = 'Strength' )

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM hero_attribute 
JOIN attribute ON hero_attribute.attribute_id = attribute.id 
WHERE attribute_name = 'Strength' AND attribute_value = (
    SELECT MAX(attribute_value) 
    FROM hero_attribute 
    JOIN attribute ON hero_attribute.attribute_id = attribute.id 
    WHERE attribute_name = 'Strength'
);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM hero_attribute 
WHERE attribute_value = (
    SELECT MAX(attribute_value) 
    FROM hero_attribute 
    JOIN attribute ON hero_attribute.attribute_id = attribute.id 
    WHERE attribute.attribute_name = 'Strength'
);

SELECT COUNT(*) AS hero_count
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
JOIN attribute a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id
WHERE ha.attribute_value = (SELECT MAX(ha2.attribute_value)
                           FROM hero_attribute ha2
                           JOIN attribute a2 ON ha2.attribute_id = a2.id
                           WHERE a2.attribute_name = 'Strength')
AND a.attribute_name = 'Strength';

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superhero AS T1 JOIN hero_attribute AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id JOIN attribute AS T3 ON T2.attribute_id = T3.id WHERE T2.attribute_value = ( SELECT MAX(T2.attribute_value) FROM hero_attribute AS T2 JOIN attribute AS T3 ON T2.attribute_id = T3.id WHERE T3.attribute_name = 'Strength' )

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN s.gender_id = g.id AND g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / 
    COUNT(s.publisher_id = p.id AND p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics') AS percentage_female_marvelHeroes
FROM 
    superhero s
JOIN 
    gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
JOIN 
    publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE 
    s.publisher_id = p.id AND p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.gender_id = (SELECT id FROM gender WHERE gender = 'Female') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / 
        COUNT(T1.superhero_name)
    ) AS percentage_female_marvel_heroes
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id
WHERE 
    T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';

SELECT 
    (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100) / COUNT(*) AS percentage_female_marvel
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id
JOIN 
    gender AS T3 ON T1.gender_id = T3.id
WHERE 
    T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_female_heroes
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    gender AS T2 ON T1.gender_id = T2.id
JOIN 
    publisher AS T3 ON T1.publisher_id = T3.id
WHERE 
    T3.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'Female' AND T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS percentage_female_marvel
FROM 
    superhero AS T1
JOIN 
    publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id
JOIN 
    gender AS T3 ON T1.gender_id = T3.id;

SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.superhero_name) AS percentage
FROM superhero AS T1
JOIN gender AS T2 ON T1.gender_id = T2.id
JOIN publisher AS T3 ON T1.publisher_id = T3.id
WHERE T3.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics';

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.superhero_name) FROM superhero AS T1 JOIN gender AS T2 ON T1.gender_id = T2.id JOIN publisher AS T3 ON T1.publisher_id = T3.id WHERE T3.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'

JOIN posts AS p ON ph.PostId = p.Id

    SELECT PostId

    GROUP BY PostId
    HAVING COUNT(PostId) = 1
)
AND p.Views >= 1000;

WHERE p.Views >= 1000
GROUP BY p.OwnerUserId, ph.PostId
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ph.PostId) = 1;

JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE p.Views >= 1000

HAVING COUNT(ph.Id) = 1;

587:
SELECT AVG(posts.ViewCount), posts.Title, comments.Text
FROM posts
JOIN tags ON posts.Tags LIKE '%' || tags.TagName || '%'
JOIN comments ON posts.Id = comments.PostId
WHERE tags.TagName LIKE '%<humor>%'
GROUP BY posts.Title, comments.Text;

SELECT AVG(posts.ViewCount), posts.Title, comments.Text
FROM posts
JOIN Tags ON posts.Tags LIKE '%' || Tags.TagName || '%'
JOIN comments ON posts.Id = comments.PostId
WHERE Tags.TagName = 'humor';

SELECT p.Title, c.Text, AVG(p.ViewCount) AS AverageViewCount
FROM posts p
JOIN postTags pt ON p.Id = pt.PostId
JOIN tags t ON pt.TagId = t.Id
JOIN comments c ON p.Id = c.PostId
WHERE t.TagName LIKE '<humor>'
GROUP BY p.Id;

SELECT AVG(posts.ViewCount), posts.Title, comments.Text
FROM posts
INNER JOIN tags ON posts.Tags LIKE '%<humor>%'
INNER JOIN comments ON posts.Id = comments.PostId
GROUP BY posts.Title, comments.Text;

SELECT 
    p.Id AS PostId,
    p.Title,
    c.Text AS Comment,
    AVG(p.ViewCount) OVER () AS AvgViewCount
FROM 
    posts p
JOIN 
    postTags pt ON p.Id = pt.PostId
JOIN 
    tags t ON pt.TagId = t.Id
JOIN 
    comments c ON p.Id = c.PostId
WHERE 
    t.TagName LIKE '<humor>'
GROUP BY 
    p.Id, p.Title, c.Text;

SELECT AVG(T1.ViewCount), T1.Title, T3.Text FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.Tags LIKE '%' + T2.TagName + '%' INNER JOIN comments AS T3 ON T1.Id = T3.PostId WHERE T2.TagName LIKE '%<humor>%'

SELECT AVG(T1.ViewCount), T1.Title, NULL AS Comment
FROM posts AS T1
JOIN postTags AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.PostId
JOIN tags AS T3 ON T2.TagId = T3.Id
WHERE T3.TagName = '<humor>'
GROUP BY T1.Id;
598:
SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', Date) = '2010' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', Date) = '2011' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) * 100 - 100) AS PercentageDifference
FROM 
    badges
WHERE 
    Name = 'Student';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Date) = '2010' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(T1.Name)) - 
     (SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Date) = '2011' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(T1.Name))) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    badges AS T1
WHERE 
    T1.Name = 'Student';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(b.Date) = 2010 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100 -
     (SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(b.Date) = 2011 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100) AS PercentageDifference
FROM 
    badges b
WHERE 
    b.Name = 'Student';

SELECT

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN DisplayName = 'Harvey Motulsky' THEN ViewCount ELSE 0 END) AS TotalViewsMotulsky,
       SUM(CASE WHEN DisplayName = 'Noah Snyder' THEN ViewCount ELSE 0 END) AS TotalViewsSnyder
FROM posts
WHERE DisplayName IN ('Harvey Motulsky', 'Noah Snyder');

SELECT u.DisplayName, SUM(p.ViewCount) AS TotalViewCount
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE u.DisplayName IN ('Harvey Motulsky', 'Noah Snyder')
GROUP BY u.DisplayName
ORDER BY TotalViewCount DESC
LIMIT 1;

FROM posts
WHERE OwnerDisplayName IN ('Harvey Motulsky', 'Noah Snyder')
ORDER BY ViewCount DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT MAX(SUM(p.ViewCount)) AS MaxViewCount
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE u.DisplayName IN ('Harvey Motulsky', 'Noah Snyder')
GROUP BY u.DisplayName;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN SUMViewMotulsky > SUMViewSnyder THEN 'Harvey Motulsky'
        ELSE 'Noah Snyder'
    END AS HigherPopularityAuthor,
    SUMViewMotulsky + SUMViewSnyder AS TotalViews
FROM (
    SELECT SUM(posts.ViewCount) AS SUMViewMotulsky
    FROM posts
    JOIN users ON posts.OwnerUserId = users.Id
    WHERE users.DisplayName = 'Harvey Motulsky'
) AS MotulskyViews
JOIN (
    SELECT SUM(posts.ViewCount) AS SUMViewSnyder
    FROM posts
    JOIN users ON posts.OwnerUserId = users.Id
    WHERE users.DisplayName = 'Noah Snyder'
) AS SnyderViews;

SELECT SUM(T1.ViewCount) AS TotalViewCount, T2.DisplayName
FROM posts AS T1
JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id
WHERE T2.DisplayName IN ('Harvey Motulsky', 'Noah Snyder')
GROUP BY T2.DisplayName
ORDER BY TotalViewCount DESC;

    SUM(CASE WHEN u.DisplayName = 'Harvey Motulsky' THEN p.ViewCount ELSE 0 END) AS TotalViewsMotulsky,
    SUM(CASE WHEN u.DisplayName = 'Noah Snyder' THEN p.ViewCount ELSE 0 END) AS TotalViewsSnyder
FROM 
    posts p
JOIN 
    users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id;

SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(post.Tags, ',', numbers.n), ',', -1)) AS Tag
FROM posts post
JOIN users user ON post.OwnerUserId = user.Id
JOIN (SELECT 1 n UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5) numbers ON CHAR_LENGTH(post.Tags) >= CHAR_LENGTH(REPLACE(post.Tags, ',', '')) + numbers.n - 1
WHERE user.DisplayName = 'Mark Meckes' AND post.CommentCount = 0;

SELECT DISTINCT p.Tags
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
JOIN tags t ON p.Tags LIKE '%' || t.TagName || '%'

AND p.Id NOT IN (
    SELECT c.PostId
    FROM comments c

CROSS JOIN (

    SELECT 5 -- Adjust as needed based on the maximum number of tags per post

SELECT 
    SUM(u.UpVotes) / COUNT(u.Id) AS AvgUpVotes,
    SUM(u.Age) / COUNT(u.Id) AS AvgAge
FROM 
    users u
JOIN 
    posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
GROUP BY 
    u.Id
HAVING 
    COUNT(p.Id) > 10;

SELECT AVG(users.UpVotes) AS AverageUpVotes, AVG(users.Age) AS AverageAge
FROM users
JOIN posts ON users.Id = posts.OwnerUserId
GROUP BY users.Id
HAVING COUNT(posts.Id) > 10;

SELECT 
    AVG(u.UpVotes) AS AvgUpVotes,
    AVG(u.Age) AS AvgAge
FROM 
    users u
JOIN 
    posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
GROUP BY 
    u.Id
HAVING 
    COUNT(p.Id) > 10;

SELECT 
    AVG(u.UpVotes) AS AverageUpVotes,
    AVG(u.Age) AS AverageAge
FROM 
    users u
JOIN 
    posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
WHERE 
    u.Id IN (
        SELECT 
            OwnerUserId
        FROM 
            posts
        GROUP BY 
            OwnerUserId
        HAVING 
            COUNT(*) > 10
    )

SELECT 
    SUM(u.UpVotes) / COUNT(u.Id) AS AverageUpVotes,
    SUM(u.Age) / COUNT(u.Id) AS AverageAge
FROM 
    users u
JOIN 
    posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
GROUP BY 
    u.Id
HAVING 
    COUNT(p.Id) > 10;

SELECT AVG(u.UpVotes) AS AverageUpVotes, AVG(u.Age) AS AverageAge
FROM users u
JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
JOIN votes v ON p.Id = v.PostId
WHERE p.OwnerUserId IN (
    SELECT u.Id
    FROM users u
    JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
    GROUP BY u.Id
    HAVING COUNT(p.Id) > 10
)

WITH UserStats AS (
    SELECT UserId
    FROM posts
    GROUP BY UserId
    HAVING COUNT(UserId) > 10
),
AvgUpVotes AS (
    SELECT AVG(UpVotes) AS avg_up_votes
    FROM users
    WHERE Id IN (SELECT UserId FROM UserStats)
),
AvgAge AS (
    SELECT AVG(Age) AS avg_age
    FROM users
    WHERE Id IN (SELECT UserId FROM UserStats)
)
SELECT avg_up_votes, avg_age
FROM AvgUpVotes, AvgAge;

FROM sets s
JOIN set_translations st ON s.code = st.setCode
WHERE st.language = 'Korean'
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM set_translations st2
    WHERE st2.setCode = s.code
    AND st2.language LIKE '%Japanese%'
);
SELECT name FROM sets WHERE code NOT IN (SELECT setCode FROM set_translations WHERE language LIKE '%Japanese%')

FROM sets s

WHERE st.language = 'Korean'

);

SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN T1.label = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS avg_single_bonded_molecules
FROM molecule AS T1
JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE T2.bond_type = '-';

SELECT CAST(COUNT(T2.bond_id) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.molecule_id) AS average_single_bonds
FROM molecule AS T1
JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE T1.label = '+' AND T2.bond_type = '-';

JOIN connected AS T4 ON T3.bond_id = T4.bond_id
WHERE T1.label = '+' AND T3.bond_type = '-';

SELECT CAST(COUNT(*) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.molecule_id) AS average_single_bonded_molecules
FROM molecule AS T1

WHERE T1.label = '+' AND T2.bond_type = '-';

FROM molecule AS T1

Let's break down the question and the schema step-by-step:

1. **Identify the Relevant Tables**: The question involves counting molecules that have specific properties related to their bonds and labels. Therefore, we need to use the `molecule`, `bond`, and possibly other tables like `atom` if necessary.

2. **Understand the Conditions**:
   - Carcinogenic molecules: These are identified by the `label` column in the `molecule` table having the value `'+'`.
   - Single-bonded atoms: This is indicated by the `bond_type` column in the `bond` table having the value `'-'`.

3. **Formulate the Query**:
   - We need to join the `molecule` table with the `bond` table to filter out molecules that are labeled as carcinogenic and have single bonds.
   - We will then calculate the average number of single bonds per molecule.

4. **Join Conditions**:
   - Join the `molecule` table (`T1`) with the `bond` table (`T2`) on their common `molecule_id` field.

5. **Filtering**:
   - Filter the joined results where `T1.label = '+'` to get only carcinogenic molecules.
   - Further filter where `T2.bond_type = '-'` to get only single-bonded atoms.

6. **Calculating the Average**:
   - Use the `COUNT` function to count the number of single bonds (`T2.bond_type = '-'`) and divide it by the number of unique molecules (`COUNT(DISTINCT T1.molecule_id)`).

7. **Final Query**:
   - The query will look something like this:
     ```sql
     SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.bond_type = '-' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.molecule_id) AS avg_single_bonds
     FROM molecule AS T1
     JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
     WHERE T1.label = '+';
     ```

This query calculates the average number of single bonds per molecule among those labeled as carcinogenic.

231: SELECT bond_type, COUNT(*) as count FROM bond JOIN molecule ON bond.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id WHERE molecule.label = 'TR010' GROUP BY bond_type ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    T1.bond_type,
    CASE 
        WHEN T2.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 'Yes'
        ELSE 'No'
    END AS is_carcinogenic
FROM 
    bond AS T1
JOIN 
    molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE 
    T1.molecule_id = 'TR010'
GROUP BY 
    T1.bond_type
ORDER BY 
    COUNT(T1.bond_type) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT bond_type, label FROM bond 
JOIN molecule ON bond.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id 
WHERE molecule.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' AND molecule.molecule_id = 'TR010' 
GROUP BY bond_type 
ORDER BY COUNT(bond_type) DESC 
LIMIT 1;

SELECT bond_type, COUNT(*) AS bond_count
FROM bond
JOIN molecule ON bond.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.label = 'TR010'
GROUP BY bond_type
ORDER BY bond_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    T2.bond_type,
    CASE 
        WHEN LOWER(T1.label) LIKE '%carcinogen%' THEN 'Yes'
        ELSE 'No'
    END AS is_carcinogenic
FROM 
    molecule AS T1
JOIN 
    bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
JOIN 
    connected AS T3 ON T2.bond_id = T3.bond_id
WHERE 
    T1.molecule_id = 'TR010'
GROUP BY 
    T2.bond_type
ORDER BY 
    COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.bond_type, COUNT(*) AS bond_count, CASE WHEN LOWER(T1.label) LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS is_carcinogenic
FROM molecule AS T1
JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE T1.molecule_id = 'TR010'
GROUP BY T2.bond_type
ORDER BY bond_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH bond_counts AS (
    SELECT bond_type, COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM bond
    WHERE molecule_id = 'TR010'
    GROUP BY bond_type
),
most_common_bond AS (
    SELECT bond_type
    FROM bond_counts
    ORDER BY count DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT bond_type FROM most_common_bond) AS most_common_bond_type,
    (SELECT is_carcinogenic FROM molecule WHERE molecule_id = 'TR010') AS is_carcinogenic;

-- Step 1: Count the number of double bonds per molecule
WITH DoubleBonds AS (
    SELECT molecule_id, COUNT(*) AS num_double_bonds
    FROM bond
    WHERE bond_type = ' = '
    GROUP BY molecule_id
),

-- Step 2: Find the molecule(s) with the maximum number of double bonds
MaxDoubleBonds AS (
    SELECT MAX(num_double_bonds) AS max_num_double_bonds
    FROM DoubleBonds
)

-- Step 3: Check if any of these molecules have a label indicating they are carcinogenic
SELECT m.label, d.num_double_bonds
FROM molecule m
JOIN DoubleBonds d ON m.molecule_id = d.molecule_id
JOIN MaxDoubleBonds md ON d.num_double_bonds = md.max_num_double_bonds
WHERE m.label LIKE '%+%'

SELECT CAST(COUNT(T2.bond_id) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.atom_id) AS avg_bonds_per_i_atom
FROM atom AS T1
JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE T1.element = 'i'

SELECT AVG(COUNT(T2.bond_id)) AS average_bonds_per_iodine_atom
FROM atom AS T1
JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id
JOIN bond AS T3 ON T2.bond_id = T3.bond_id
WHERE T1.element = 'i';

SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT T1.bond_id) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T3.atom_id) AS average_bonds_per_i_atom
FROM connected AS T1
JOIN atom AS T3 ON T1.atom_id = T3.atom_id
WHERE T3.element = 'i';

SELECT AVG(COUNT(T3.bond_id)) AS average_bonds_per_atom
FROM atom AS T1
JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id
JOIN bond AS T3 ON T2.bond_id = T3.bond_id
WHERE T1.element = 'i'
GROUP BY T1.atom_id;

SELECT AVG(bond_count) AS average_bonds_per_iodine
FROM (
    SELECT COUNT(T1.bond_id) AS bond_count
    FROM connected AS T1
    JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id
    WHERE T2.element = 'i'
) AS subquery;

SELECT AVG(num_bonds_per_atom)
FROM (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.bond_id) / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.atom_id) AS num_bonds_per_atom
    FROM atom AS T1
    JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id
    WHERE T1.element = 'i'
) AS subquery;

SELECT AVG(T2.num_bonds)
FROM (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T3.bond_id) AS num_bonds
    FROM atom AS T1
    JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id
    JOIN bond AS T3 ON T2.bond_id = T3.bond_id
    WHERE T1.element = 'I'
) AS subquery;

WHERE T2.bond_type = '-';

SELECT ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.label = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.bond_id), 5) AS percentage_carcinogenic_single_bonds
FROM bond AS T1
JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE T1.bond_type = '-';

SELECT ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN m.label = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(b.bond_id), 5) AS percentage_carcinogenic_single_bonds
FROM bond b
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = '-';

SELECT 
    ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN T3.label = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100, 5) AS proportion

    bond AS T1
JOIN 
    connected AS T2 ON T1.bond_id = T2.bond_id
JOIN 
    molecule AS T3 ON T1.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id
WHERE 
    T1.bond_type = '-';
SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.label = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM bond AS T1 JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.bond_type = '-'

SELECT 
    ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.label = '+' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) * 100.0 / COUNT(T1.bond_id), 5) AS percentage_carcinogenic_single_bonds
FROM 
    molecule AS T1
JOIN 
    bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE 
    T2.bond_type = '-';

282:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.element = 'H' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.element) AS ratio,
    T2.label
FROM 
    atom AS T1
JOIN 
    molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE 
    T1.molecule_id = 'TR006';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN element = 'h' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS hydrogen_ratio,
    CASE 
        WHEN m.label LIKE '%+' THEN '+'
        WHEN m.label LIKE '%-' THEN '-'
        ELSE '?'
    END AS molecule_label
FROM 
    atom a
JOIN 
    molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE 
    a.molecule_id = 'TR006';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.element = 'H' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(T1.element) AS ratio,
    CASE 
        WHEN T3.label LIKE '%+' THEN '+'
        ELSE '-'
    END AS label
FROM 
    atom AS T1
JOIN 
    molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
JOIN 
    connected AS T3 ON T1.atom_id = T3.atom_id
WHERE 
    T2.molecule_id = 'TR006';

SELECT 
    m.label,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.element = 'h' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(a.atom_id) AS hydrogen_ratio
FROM 
    atom a
JOIN 
    molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE 
    a.molecule_id = 'TR006'

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN element = 'h' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) AS hydrogen_ratio,
    label
FROM 
    atom
JOIN 
    molecule ON atom.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
WHERE 
    molecule_id = 'TR006';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN t1.element = 'h' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(t1.element) AS ratio,
    CASE WHEN t2.label = '+' THEN 1 ELSE -1 END AS label
FROM 
    atom AS t1
JOIN 
    molecule AS t2 ON t1.molecule_id = t2.molecule_id
JOIN 
    connected AS t3 ON t1.atom_id = t3.atom_id
WHERE 
    t1.molecule_id = 'TR006';

SELECT 
    (SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN element = 'h' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) FROM atom WHERE molecule_id = 'TR006') AS ratio,
    molecule.label
FROM 
    molecule
WHERE 
    molecule.molecule_id = 'TR006';

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T3.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T3.element) AS percent
FROM bond AS T1
JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id AND T1.bond_id < T2.bond_id
JOIN atom AS T3 ON T1.bond_id = T3.bond_id OR T2.bond_id = T3.bond_id

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN a.element = 'cl' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percent
FROM atom a
WHERE a.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT m.molecule_id
    FROM bond b
    JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id

);

SELECT MAX(f."Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)") AS MaxEligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm f
JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds
WHERE s.NumGE1500 / s.NumTstTakr > 0.3;

SELECT MAX(f."Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)") AS MaxEligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm f
JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds
WHERE (CAST(s.NumGE1500 AS REAL) / s.NumTstTakr) > 0.3;

SELECT MAX("Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)") AS MaxEligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm
JOIN satscores ON frpm.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE (satscores.NumGE1500 / satscores.NumTstTakr) > 0.3;

JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds
WHERE CAST(s.NumGE1500 AS REAL) / s.NumTstTakr > 0.3;

FROM frpm f
JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds
WHERE s.excellence_rate > 0.3;

SELECT MAX(f."Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" / f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") AS MaxEligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm f
JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds
WHERE s.NumGE1500 IS NOT NULL AND s.NumTstTakr IS NOT NULL AND f.`Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` IS NOT NULL AND f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` IS NOT NULL
AND (s.NumGE1500 / s.NumTstTakr) > 0.3;

SELECT MAX((frpm."Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" / frpm."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)")) AS HighestEligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm
JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
JOIN satscores ON frpm.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE (satscores.NumGE1500 / NULLIF(satscores.NumTstTakr, 0)) > 0.3;

WHERE (T1.`Free Meal Count (K-12)` / T1.`Enrollment (K-12)`) > 0.1

SELECT f.School Name

JOIN satscores AS s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds
WHERE (f.[Free Meal Count (K-12)] / f.[Enrollment (K-12)]) > 0.1
AND s.AvgScrMath >= 1500;

SELECT DISTINCT T2.School
FROM frpm AS T1
JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds
WHERE (T1.`Free Meal Count (K-12)` / T1.`Enrollment (K-12)`) > 0.1
AND T2.NumGE1500 >= 1500

SELECT T3.School

SELECT T2.School

SELECT TOP 5 
    frpm.School, 
    frpm.[Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (K-12)] AS EligibleFreeOrReducedPriceMealRate
FROM 
    frpm
JOIN 
    schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
WHERE 
    schools.OwnershipCode = 66
ORDER BY 
    frpm.[FRPM Count (K-12)] DESC;

SELECT 
    frpm.SchoolName AS School,
    (frpm."FRPM Count (K-12)" / frpm."Enrollment (K-12)") AS EligibilityRate
FROM 
    frpm
JOIN 
    schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
WHERE 
    schools.OwnershipCode = '66'
ORDER BY 
    "FRPM Count (K-12)" DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT TOP 5 (f.[FRPM Count (K-12)] / f.[Enrollment (K-12)]) AS [Eligible Free or Reduced Price Meal Rate], s.School, s.District, s.County
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.[Ownership Code] = 66
ORDER BY f.[FRPM Count (K-12)] DESC;

SELECT TOP 5 f.[FRPM Count (K-12)] / f.[Enrollment (K-12)] AS EligibleFreeReducedPriceMealRate, f.[School Name], f.[County Name], f.[District Name]
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.[Ownership Code] = '66'
ORDER BY f.[FRPM Count (K-12)] DESC;

SELECT

JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    s.OwnershipCode = 66

SELECT TOP 5 
    frpm.CDSCode,
    frpm.School Name,
    frpm.County Name,

    frpm.FRPM Count (K-12),

SELECT s.School, s.DOCType
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE (f.`Enrollment (K-12)` - f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) > AVG(f.`Enrollment (K-12)` - f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) OVER ()

SELECT 
    s.School, 
    s.DOC, 
    s.DOCType
FROM 
    frpm f
JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    ABS(f.`Enrollment (K-12)` - f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) > (
        SELECT 
            AVG(ABS(f2.`Enrollment (K-12)` - f2.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`))
        FROM 
            frpm f2
    )

SELECT 
    T2.School, 
    T2.DOCType 
FROM 
    frpm AS T1 
JOIN 
    schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode 
WHERE 
    ABS(T1.`Enrollment (K-12)` - T1.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) > (
        SELECT 
            AVG(ABS(T1.`Enrollment (K-12)` - T1.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`)) 
        FROM 
            frpm AS T1 
        JOIN 
            schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode 
        WHERE 
            T2.FundingType = 'Local'
    )

SELECT 
    s.School,
    s.DOCType
FROM 
    frpm f
JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    f.`Enrollment (K-12)` > f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`
AND 
    s.FundingType = 'Local'

SELECT 
    T2.School, 
    T2.DOCType,
    T2.DocType,
    (T2.Enrollment - T2.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) AS Diff
FROM 
    frpm AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE 
    (T2.Enrollment - T2.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) > (
        SELECT 
            AVG(T2.Enrollment - T2.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`)
        FROM 
            frpm AS T1
        INNER JOIN 
            schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
        WHERE 
            T2.FundingType = 'Local'
    )

SELECT 
    s.School, 
    s.DOC, 
    s.DOCType
FROM 
    frpm f
JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    f.[Enrollment (K-12)] - f.[Enrollment (Ages 5-17)] > (
        SELECT 
            AVG(f.[Enrollment (K-12)] - f.[Enrollment (Ages 5-17)])
        FROM 
            frpm f
        JOIN 
            schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
    )
AND 
    s.FundingType = 'Locally Funded';

WITH avg_diff AS (
    SELECT AVG((Enrollment_K_12 - Enrollment_Ages_5_17)) AS avg_diff
    FROM frpm
    JOIN schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
    WHERE FundingType = 'Locally Funded'
)
SELECT 
    schools.School,
    schools.DOCType,
    (frpm.Enrollment_K_12 - frpm.Enrollment_Ages_5_17) AS diff
FROM 
    frpm
JOIN 
    schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
WHERE 
    FundingType = 'Locally Funded'
    AND (frpm.Enrollment_K_12 - frpm.Enrollment_Ages_5_17) > (SELECT avg_diff FROM avg_diff);

WHERE 
    s.AdmFName1 = 'Ricci' AND s.AdmLName1 = 'Ulrich'

    s.School;

INNER JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds
WHERE T1.AdmFName1 = 'Ricci' AND T1.AdmLName1 = 'Ulrich'

SELECT t1.School, AVG(t3.AvgScrWrite) AS AverageWritingScore

JOIN satscores AS t3 ON t1.CDSCode = t3.cds

SELECT 
    s.School,
    s.County,
    AVG(ss.AvgScrRead) AS AverageReadingScore,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.County ORDER BY AVG(ss.AvgScrRead) DESC) AS Rank
FROM 
    schools s
JOIN 
    satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE 
    s.Virtual = 'F'
GROUP BY 
    s.School, s.County
HAVING 
    Rank <= 5;

SELECT 
    T1.School,
    T1.County,
    T2.AvgScrRead,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY T1.County ORDER BY T2.AvgScrRead DESC) AS Rank
FROM 
    schools AS T1
JOIN 
    satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds
WHERE 
    T1.Virtual = 'F'
ORDER BY 
    T1.County,
    Rank;

SELECT 
    T2.School AS SchoolName,
    T2.County AS CountyName,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY T2.County ORDER BY T1.AvgScrRead DESC) AS Rank
FROM 
    satscores AS T1
JOIN 
    frpm AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode
JOIN 
    schools AS T3 ON T2.CDSCode = T3.CDSCode
WHERE 
    T3.Virtual = 'F'
ORDER BY 
    T2.County,
    Rank;

WITH RankedSchools AS (
    SELECT
        s.School,
        f.County,
        f.AvgScrRead,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY f.County ORDER BY f.AvgScrRead DESC) AS Rank
    FROM
        frpm f
    JOIN
        schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
    WHERE
        s.Virtual = 'F'
)
SELECT
    School,
    County,
    AvgScrRead
FROM
    RankedSchools
WHERE
    Rank <= 5;

SELECT t1.School
FROM schools AS t1
JOIN satscores AS t2 ON t1.CDSCode = t2.cds
WHERE t1.Virtual = 'F'
AND ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t1.County ORDER BY t2.AvgScrRead DESC) <= 5;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN DOC = 54 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN DOC = 52 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio
FROM 
    schools
WHERE 
    County = 'Orange';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.DOC = 54 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) / 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.DOC = 52 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS Ratio
FROM 
    schools AS T1
JOIN 
    frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE 
    T1.County = 'Orange'

SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN DOC = 54 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN DOC = 52 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS Ratio
FROM 
    schools
WHERE 
    County = 'Orange';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.DOC = 54 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.DOC = 52 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio
FROM 
    schools AS T1
JOIN 
    frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE 
    T1.County = 'Orange'

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN DOC = '52' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS elementary_school_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DOC = '54' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unified_school_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN DOC = '52' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN DOC = '54' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ratio
FROM 
    schools
WHERE 
    County = 'Orange';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Merged = 'Yes' AND T2.DOC = 54 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Merged = 'Yes' AND T2.DOC = 52 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio
FROM 
    frpm AS T1
JOIN 
    schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE 
    T2.County = 'Orange'

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.DOC = 54 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.DOC = 52 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio
FROM 
    schools AS T1
JOIN 
    frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE 
    T1.DOC IN (52, 54);

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT MailCity) AS NumberOfCities, COUNT(CDSCode) AS TotalNumberOfSchools
FROM schools
JOIN frpm ON schools.CDSCode = frpm.CDSCode
WHERE schools.Magnet = 1 AND (frpm.LowGrade = 'K' OR frpm.HighGrade = '8') AND frpm.`NSLP Provision Status` = 'Multiple Provision Types';

SELECT COUNT(school), school.City
FROM schools
JOIN frpm ON schools.CDSCode = frpm.CDSCode
WHERE schools.Magnet = 1
AND schools.GSoffered LIKE '%K%'
AND schools.GSoffered LIKE '%8%'
AND frpm.`NSLP Provision Status` = 'Multiple Provision Types'
GROUP BY school.City;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS TotalSchools, City
FROM schools
WHERE Magnet = 1 AND GSoffered LIKE '%K%' AND GSoffered LIKE '%8%' AND `NSLP Provision Status` = 'Multiple Provision Types'
GROUP BY City;

SELECT COUNT(*), T1.MailCity FROM schools AS T1 JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.Magnet = 1 AND T1.GSoffered = 'K-8' AND T2.`NSLP Provision Status` = 'Multiple Provision Types' GROUP BY T1.MailCity;

SELECT 
    s.School AS SchoolName,
    f.[Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)] AS FRPMPercentage
FROM 
    frpm f
JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    f.[Low Grade] = 'K' AND f.[High Grade] = '9'
    AND s.County = 'Los Angeles'

SELECT DISTINCT T2.School, (T1.`FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)` / T1.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` * 100) AS `Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)`
FROM frpm AS T1
JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T2.County = 'Los Angeles' AND T2.GSoffered = 'K-9';

SELECT 
    T2.School AS SchoolName,
    (T1.[FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)] / T1.[Enrollment (Ages 5-17)]) * 100 AS PercentEligibleFRPM
FROM 
    frpm AS T1
JOIN 
    schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE 
    T2.County = 'Los Angeles'
    AND T2.SchoolType IN ('Elementary', 'Middle')
    AND T2.GSoffered BETWEEN 'Kindergarten' AND '9th Grade'
GROUP BY 
    T2.School;

SELECT DISTINCT s.School, (f."FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)" / f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") * 100 AS "Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)"
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.County = 'Los Angeles' AND s.GSoffered LIKE '%Kindergarten%' AND s.GSoffered LIKE '%9th%' AND f."Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)" IS NOT NULL AND f."Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)" > 0;

SELECT 
    s.School AS SchoolName,
    f.[Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)] AS FRPMPercentage
FROM 
    frpm f
JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    s.County = 'Los Angeles'
    AND s.GradeSpan LIKE '%Kindergarten%'
    AND s.GradeSpan LIKE '%9th Grade%'

SELECT 
    T1.School, 
    T1.District, 
    T1.County, 
    (T2.`FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)` / T2.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) * 100 AS `Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)`
FROM 
    schools AS T1
JOIN 
    frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE 
    T1.County = 'Los Angeles' 
    AND T1.GSoffered LIKE '%Kindergarten%' 
    AND T1.GSoffered LIKE '%9th%'

SELECT 
    T2.School,
    T1.[Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)],
    (T1.[FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)] / T1.[Enrollment (Ages 5-17)]) * 100 AS [Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)]
FROM 
    frpm AS T1
INNER JOIN 
    schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE 
    T2.GSoffered LIKE '%Kindergarten%' AND 
    T2.GSoffered LIKE '%9th%' AND 
    T2.County = 'Los Angeles'

SELECT 
    MAX(A11) - MIN(A11) AS gap
FROM (
    SELECT 
        AVG(A11) AS A11,
        client_id
    FROM 
        client
    JOIN 
        disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
    WHERE 
        gender = 'F'
    GROUP BY 
        client_id
) AS avg_salary;

SELECT MIN(A11) - MAX(A11) AS gap
FROM (
    SELECT AVG(T3.amount) / COUNT(DISTINCT T2.account_id) AS A11,
           T1.birth_date
    FROM client AS T1
    JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
    JOIN trans AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
    WHERE T1.gender = 'F'
    GROUP BY T1.birth_date
) AS subquery
ORDER BY birth_date ASC;

SELECT 
    d.A11 AS average_salary,
    d.A11 - MIN(d.A11) OVER () AS gap
FROM 
    client c
JOIN 
    disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
WHERE 
    c.gender = 'F'
ORDER BY 
    c.birth_date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT MAX(avg_salary) - MIN(avg_salary) AS salary_gap FROM (SELECT AVG(A11) AS avg_salary FROM client JOIN district ON client.district_id = district.district_id WHERE gender = 'F' GROUP BY client_id) AS subquery;

SELECT T1.account_id
FROM account AS T1
JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id
JOIN district AS T4 ON T1.district_id = T4.district_id
WHERE T3.gender = 'F'
ORDER BY T3.birth_date ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH avg_salary AS (
    SELECT AVG(T4.A11) AS avg_sal
    FROM account AS T1
    JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
    JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id
    JOIN district AS T4 ON T1.district_id = T4.district_id
    WHERE T3.gender = 'F'
),
highest_avg_salary AS (
    SELECT MAX(avg_sal) AS max_sal
    FROM avg_salary
),
lowest_avg_salary AS (
    SELECT MIN(avg_sal) AS min_sal
    FROM avg_salary
)
SELECT (SELECT max_sal FROM highest_avg_salary) - (SELECT min_sal FROM lowest_avg_salary) AS gap;

```sql
SELECT 
    (SELECT MAX(avg_salary) 
     FROM (
         SELECT c.client_id, d.A11 AS avg_salary
         FROM client c
         JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
         WHERE c.gender = 'F'
     ) AS subquery) -
    (SELECT AVG(d.A11) 
     FROM client c
     JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
     WHERE c.gender = 'F' AND c.birth_date = (
         SELECT MIN(c2.birth_date)
         FROM client c2
         WHERE c2.gender = 'F'
     )) AS gap;
```

    client AS T1

    disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id

SELECT 
    d.district_id,
    SUM(d.A4) AS total_inhabitants,
    COUNT(c.gender) AS total_clients,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'M' THEN c.gender END) AS male_clients
FROM 
    district d
JOIN 
    client c ON d.district_id = c.district_id
WHERE 
    d.A3 = 'South Bohemia'
GROUP BY 
    d.district_id
ORDER BY 
    total_inhabitants DESC
LIMIT 1;

-- This will give us the district with the most inhabitants in South Bohemia.
-- Now, let's calculate the percentage of male clients in that district:

WITH most_populous_district AS (
    SELECT 
        d.district_id,
        SUM(d.A4) AS total_inhabitants,
        COUNT(c.gender) AS total_clients,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'M' THEN c.gender END) AS male_clients
    FROM 
        district d
    JOIN 
        client c ON d.district_id = c.district_id
    WHERE 
        d.A3 = 'South Bohemia'
    GROUP BY 
        d.district_id
)
SELECT 
    (male_clients / total_clients) * 100 AS percentage_male_clients
FROM 
    most_populous_district;

SELECT 
    d.A2 AS district,
    d.A3 AS state,
    ((d.A13 - d.A12) / d.A12) * 100 AS unemployment_rate_increment
FROM 
    loan l
JOIN 
    account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN 
    district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE 
    l.status = 'D';

SELECT 
    d.A2 AS district_name,
    d.A3 AS district_state,
    ((d.A13 - d.A12) / d.A12) * 100 AS unemployment_increment_rate
FROM 
    loan l
JOIN 
    account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN 
    client c ON a.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN 
    district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE 
    l.status = 'D'

SELECT 
    d.district_id,
    d.A2 AS district_name,
    d.A3 AS state,
    ((d.A13 - d.A12) / d.A12) * 100 AS unemployment_rate_increase_percentage
FROM 
    loan l
JOIN 
    client c ON l.account_id = c.account_id
JOIN 
    disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id AND c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE 
    l.status = 'D'
GROUP BY 
    d.district_id, d.A2, d.A3;

SELECT 
    d.A2 AS district, 
    d.A3 AS state, 
    ((d.A13 - d.A12) / d.A12) * 100 AS unemployment_rate_increment
FROM 
    account a
JOIN 
    disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN 
    client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN 
    loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE 
    a.status = 'D'
GROUP BY 
    d.A2, 
    d.A3;

SELECT d.A2, d.A3, ((d.A13 - d.A12) / d.A12) * 100 AS unemployment_increase
FROM account a
JOIN disp ON a.account_id = disp.account_id
JOIN client c ON disp.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE l.status = 'D'

SELECT 
    d.A2 AS district,
    d.A3 AS state,
    ((d.A13 - d.A12) / d.A12) * 100 AS unemployment_rate_increase
FROM 
    loan l
JOIN 
    account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN 
    client c ON a.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN 
    district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE 
    l.status = 'D'
GROUP BY 
    d.A2, d.A3;

SELECT 
    d.district_id,
    d.A2 AS district_name,
    d.A12 AS unemployment_1995,
    d.A13 AS unemployment_1996,
    ((d.A13 - d.A12) / d.A12) * 100 AS unemployment_increase_percentage
FROM 
    loan l
JOIN 
    disp d ON l.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN 
    client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN 
    district ds ON c.district_id = ds.district_id
WHERE 
    l.status = 'D'
GROUP BY 
    d.district_id, d.A2, d.A12, d.A13;

JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id

GROUP BY d.A2
ORDER BY total_withdrawals DESC

JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id

GROUP BY d.A2
ORDER BY total_withdrawal DESC

SELECT d.A2, SUM(t.amount) AS total_withdrawal
FROM trans t

JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE t.type = 'VYDAJ'
AND t.date LIKE '1996-01%'

-- Step 1: Identify Credit Card Transactions
WITH credit_card_transactions AS (
    SELECT account_id, amount
    FROM trans
    WHERE operation = 'VYBER KARTOU'
),

-- Step 2: Calculate Average Transaction Amount in 1998
average_transaction_amount AS (
    SELECT AVG(amount) AS avg_amount
    FROM trans
    WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date) = 1998
)

-- Step 3: Filter Transactions Below Average
SELECT account_id
FROM credit_card_transactions
JOIN average_transaction_amount ON credit_card_transactions.amount < average_transaction_amount.avg_amount;

SELECT account_id
FROM trans
WHERE Operation = 'VYBER KARTOU'
AND YEAR(date) = 1998
AND amount < (
    SELECT AVG(amount)
    FROM trans
    WHERE Operation = 'VYBER KARTOU'
    AND YEAR(date) = 1998
)
GROUP BY account_id;

SELECT t1.account_id
FROM trans AS t1
JOIN card AS t2 ON t1.account_id = t2.account_id
WHERE t1.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU'
AND t1.amount < (SELECT AVG(amount) FROM trans WHERE date BETWEEN '1998-01-01' AND '1998-12-31')
SELECT DISTINCT client_id FROM trans WHERE operation = 'VYBER KARTOU' AND date LIKE '1998%' AND amount < (SELECT AVG(amount) FROM trans WHERE operation = 'VYBER KARTOU' AND date LIKE '1998%')

SELECT T1.account_id
FROM account AS T1
JOIN trans AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T2.date) = '1998'
AND T2.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU'
AND T2.amount < (SELECT AVG(amount) FROM trans WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', date) = '1998')

SELECT DISTINCT account_id FROM trans WHERE operation = 'VYBER KARTOU' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date) = 1998 AND amount < (SELECT AVG(amount) FROM trans WHERE operation = 'VYBER KARTOU' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date) = 1998)

WITH AvgTransaction AS (
    SELECT AVG(amount) AS avg_amount
    FROM trans
    WHERE YEAR(date) = 1998 AND k_symbol = 'VYBER KARTOU'
)
SELECT DISTINCT t.account_id
FROM trans t
JOIN card c ON t.account_id = c.account_id
WHERE YEAR(t.date) = 1998 AND t.k_symbol = 'VYBER KARTOU' AND t.amount < (SELECT avg_amount FROM AvgTransaction);

FROM district
JOIN account ON district.district_id = account.district_id
JOIN loan ON account.account_id = loan.account_id
WHERE YEAR(account.date) BETWEEN 1997 AND 1997
AND district.A15 > 4000;

FROM district d
JOIN account a ON d.district_id = a.district_id
JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE t.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '1995-12-31'
GROUP BY d.district_id
HAVING COUNT(t.trans_id) > 4000
AND MIN(a.date) >= '1997-01-01';

FROM district d
JOIN account a ON d.district_id = a.district_id
WHERE a.date >= '1997-01-01'
GROUP BY d.A3, d.A15
HAVING COUNT(a.account_id) > 4000;

SELECT 
    ((t1.balance - t2.balance) / t2.balance) * 100 AS balance_increase_rate
FROM 
    trans AS t1
JOIN 
    trans AS t2 ON t1.account_id = t2.account_id AND t1.date = '1993-03-22' AND t2.date = '1998-12-27'
WHERE 
    EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 
        FROM loan AS l 
        JOIN disp AS d ON l.account_id = d.account_id 
        WHERE l.date = '1993-07-05' AND d.client_id = t1.account_id
    )

SELECT 
    ((t1.balance - t2.balance) / t2.balance) * 100 AS increase_rate
FROM 
    trans AS t1
JOIN 
    trans AS t2 ON t1.account_id = t2.account_id AND t1.date < t2.date
WHERE 
    t1.date BETWEEN '1993-03-22' AND '1998-12-27'
ORDER BY 
    t1.date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    ((T3.balance - T4.balance) / T4.balance) * 100 AS increase_rate
FROM 
    loan AS T1
JOIN 
    account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
JOIN 
    trans AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id AND T3.date BETWEEN '1993-03-22' AND '1998-12-27'
JOIN 
    trans AS T4 ON T2.account_id = T4.account_id AND T4.date = '1993-07-05'
WHERE 
    T1.date = '1993-07-05';

SELECT 
    ((t1.balance - t2.balance) / t2.balance) * 100 AS increase_rate
FROM 
    trans t1
JOIN 
    trans t2 ON t1.client_id = t2.client_id AND t1.account_id = t2.account_id
WHERE 
    t1.date = '1993-03-22' AND t2.date = '1998-12-27'
AND
    EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM loan l
        JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
        WHERE l.date = '1993-07-05' AND a.client_id = t1.client_id
    )

SELECT 
    ((t1.balance - t2.balance) / t2.balance) * 100 AS increase_rate
FROM 
    trans AS t1
JOIN 
    trans AS t2 ON t2.account_id = t1.account_id AND t2.date = '1993-03-22'
WHERE 
    t1.account_id IN (
        SELECT 
            d.account_id
        FROM 
            client AS c
        JOIN 
            disp AS d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
        JOIN 
            loan AS l ON d.account_id = l.account_id
        WHERE 
            l.date = '1993-07-05'
    )
AND 
    t1.date = '1998-12-27';

SELECT 
    c.client_id,
    c.gender,
    c.birth_date,
    d.A2,
    ((t.balance_at_A - t.balance_at_B) / t.balance_at_B) * 100 AS increase_rate
FROM 
    loan l
JOIN 
    account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN 
    disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id AND a.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN 
    client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN 
    trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE 
    l.date = '1993-07-05'
    AND t.date BETWEEN '1993-03-22' AND '1998-12-27'
ORDER BY 
    t.date ASC;

WITH client_info AS (
    SELECT T2.client_id
    FROM loan AS T1
    JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
    WHERE T1.date = '1993-07-05'
    ORDER BY T1.date ASC
    LIMIT 1
),
balances AS (
    SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T3.date = '1993-03-22' THEN T3.amount ELSE 0 END) AS balance_1993_03_22,
           SUM(CASE WHEN T3.date = '1998-12-27' THEN T3.amount ELSE 0 END) AS balance_1998_12_27
    FROM trans AS T3
    JOIN account AS T4 ON T3.account_id = T4.account_id
)
SELECT ((balance_1998_12_27 - balance_1993_03_22) / balance_1998_12_27) * 100 AS increase_rate
FROM balances;

SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS statement_requests,
    SUM(amount) AS total_debited,
    k_symbol AS purpose_of_debit
FROM 
    trans
WHERE 
    account_id = 3 AND 
    type = 'VYBER' -- Assuming 'VYBER' indicates a withdrawal or debit
GROUP BY 
    k_symbol;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_requests FROM trans WHERE type = 'VYBER' AND account_id = 3
UNION ALL
SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_debited FROM trans WHERE type = 'PRIJEM' AND account_id = 3

SELECT SUM(o.amount) AS total_debited
FROM trans t
JOIN order o ON t.account_id = o.account_id
WHERE t.account_id = 3 AND t.type = 'výběr';

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN type = 'vypis' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS num_statements,
       SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'vyber' AND amount = 3539 THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS total_debit_amount
FROM trans
WHERE account_id = 3;

SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN k_symbol = 'Faktura' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS statement_requests,
    SUM(amount) AS total_debit_amount
FROM 
    trans
WHERE 
    account_id = 3 AND
    amount = 3539 AND
    type = 'Výber';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trans WHERE account_id = 3 AND type = 'Výběr na uživatelské účet'; SELECT SUM(amount), k_symbol FROM order GROUP BY k_symbol HAVING SUM(amount) = 3539;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(T1.client_id)) * 100 AS percentage_female_clients
FROM 
    client AS T1
JOIN 
    disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN 
    account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
JOIN 
    district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id
WHERE 
    T4.A11 > 10000;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.client_id) AS percentage_female_clients
FROM 
    client AS T1
JOIN 
    disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN 
    account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
JOIN 
    district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id
WHERE 
    AVG(T4.A11) > 10000;

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_female_clients
FROM client AS T1
JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
JOIN district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id
WHERE T4.A11 > 10000;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(T1.client_id)) * 100 AS percentage_female_clients
FROM 
    client AS T1
JOIN 
    disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN 
    account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
JOIN 
    district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id
WHERE 
    T4.A11 > 10000;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_female_clients
FROM 
    client AS T1
JOIN 
    disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN 
    account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
JOIN 
    district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id
WHERE 
    T4.A11 > 10000;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) 
FROM 
    client AS T1 
JOIN 
    disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id 
JOIN 
    account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id

    district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id
