SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN gender = 'F' THEN client_id ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*)
FROM client
WHERE client_id IN (
    SELECT c.client_id
    FROM client c
    JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
    WHERE d.account_id IN (
        SELECT a.account_id
        FROM account a
        JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
        GROUP BY d.district_id
        HAVING AVG(d.A11) > 10000
    )
);

FROM loan
JOIN trans ON loan.account_id = trans.account_id
WHERE loan.status = 'C' AND trans.type = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'
GROUP BY trans.trans_id;

SELECT AVG(loan.amount)
FROM loan
JOIN trans ON loan.account_id = trans.account_id
WHERE loan.status = 'C'
AND trans.type = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU';

SELECT AVG(loan.amount) AS average_loan_amount
FROM loan
JOIN trans ON loan.account_id = trans.account_id
WHERE trans.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'
AND loan.status = 'C';

SELECT AVG(loan.amount)
FROM loan
JOIN trans ON loan.account_id = trans.account_id
WHERE loan.status = 'C' AND trans.type = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU';

SELECT AVG(loan.amount) AS avg_loan_amount

SELECT c.client_id, d.A11 AS average_salary
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
ORDER BY c.birth_date DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.client_id, AVG(l.amount) AS avg_salary
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
LEFT JOIN loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id AND c.gender = 'F'
GROUP BY c.client_id
ORDER BY c.birth_date ASC, avg_salary ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT t1.account_id
FROM account AS t1
JOIN client AS t2 ON t1.account_id = t2.account_id
JOIN district AS t3 ON t1.district_id = t3.district_id
WHERE t2.gender = 'F'
ORDER BY t2.birth_date ASC, t3.A11 ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T2.account_id 
FROM client AS T1 
JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id 
JOIN loan AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id 
WHERE T1.gender = 'F' 
GROUP BY T1.client_id 
ORDER BY AVG(T3.amount) DESC 
LIMIT 1;

SELECT T1.account_id
FROM account AS T1
JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN trans AS T3 ON T1.account_id = T3.account_id
WHERE T2.gender = 'F'
GROUP BY T1.account_id
ORDER BY AVG(T3.amount) ASC, DATEDIFF(YEAR, T2.birth_date, GETDATE()) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT T2.account_id FROM client AS T1 JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id JOIN district AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id WHERE T1.gender = 'F' ORDER BY T1.birth_date ASC, T3.A11 ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT T2.account_id FROM client AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id JOIN district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id WHERE T1.gender = 'F' ORDER BY T1.birth_date ASC, T4.A11 ASC LIMIT 1;

SELECT DISTINCT d.client_id, TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, c.birth_date, CURDATE()) AS age
FROM disp d
JOIN card c ON d.disp_id = c.disp_id
JOIN client cl ON d.client_id = cl.client_id
WHERE c.type = 'gold'
AND d.type = 'OWNER'

SELECT c.client_id, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, c.birth_date)) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold'
AND d.type = 'OWNER';

SELECT c.client_id, DATE_PART('year', AGE(c.birth_date)) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold' AND d.type = 'OWNER';

SELECT c.client_id, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(c.birth_date)) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold' AND d.type = 'OWNER';

SELECT c.client_id, TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, c.birth_date, CURDATE()) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold' AND d.type = 'OWNER';

SELECT DISTINCT c.client_id, FLOOR(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), c.birth_date) / 365) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold' AND d.type = 'OWNER';

SELECT c.client_id, DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), c.birth_date) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold' AND d.type = 'OWNER';
169:
SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T2.date) = 1997 THEN T2.amount ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T2.date) = 1996 THEN T2.amount ELSE 0 END)) /
    SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T2.date) = 1996 THEN T2.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM 
    account AS T1
JOIN 
    loan AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
JOIN 
    client AS T3 ON T1.district_id = T3.district_id
WHERE 
    T3.gender = 'M';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(loan.date) = 1997 THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(loan.date) = 1996 THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END)) /
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(loan.date) = 1996 THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM 
    client
JOIN 
    loan ON client.client_id = loan.client_id
WHERE 
    client.gender = 'M' AND 
    client.birth_date BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1997-12-31';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(l.date) = 1997 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(l.date) = 1996 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END)) /
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(l.date) = 1996 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM 
    client c
JOIN 
    loan l ON c.client_id = l.client_id
WHERE 
    c.gender = 'M';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.date) = 1997 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END)) -
     (SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.date) = 1996 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END))) /
    (SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.date) = 1996 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM 
    client c
JOIN 
    disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN 
    loan l ON d.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE 
    c.gender = 'M'
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM c.birth_date) BETWEEN 1996 AND 1997;

SELECT ((SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', loan.date) = '1997' THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', loan.date) = '1996' THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END)) / SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', loan.date) = '1996' THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM loan
JOIN account ON loan.account_id = account.account_id
JOIN client ON account.client_id = client.client_id
WHERE client.gender = 'M'

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T3.date) = 1997 THEN T3.amount ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T3.date) = 1996 THEN T3.amount ELSE 0 END)) /
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(T3.date) = 1996 THEN T3.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM 
    client AS T1
JOIN 
    disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id
JOIN 
    loan AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
WHERE 
    T1.gender = 'M' 
    AND T1.birth_date BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1997-12-31';

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM loan.date) = 1997 THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM loan.date) = 1996 THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END)) / 
     SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM loan.date) = 1996 THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM 
    client
JOIN 
    account ON client.client_id = account.client_id
JOIN 
    loan ON account.account_id = loan.account_id
WHERE 
    client.gender = 'M' 
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM client.birth_date) BETWEEN 1996 AND 1997;

SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id, d.A2 AS district_name, d.A3 AS district_region
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id AND d.disp_id = t.disp_id
WHERE strftime('%Y', t.date) = '1993'
AND t.operation IN ('Obrat', 'Výdej', 'Převod z účtu')

SELECT DISTINCT T1.account_id, T3.A2, T3.A3
FROM account AS T1
JOIN trans AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
JOIN district AS T3 ON T1.district_id = T3.district_id
WHERE strftime('%Y', T1.date) = '1993'
AND T2.date < T1.date;

SELECT DISTINCT T1.account_id, T3.A2, T3.A3
FROM account AS T1
JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
JOIN district AS T3 ON T1.district_id = T3.district_id
JOIN trans AS T4 ON T1.account_id = T4.account_id
WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T4.date) = '1993'
AND T2.type = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU';

SELECT 
    a.account_id, 
    d.A2 AS district_name, 
    d.A3 AS district_region 
FROM 
    account a 
JOIN 
    trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id 
JOIN 
    district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id 
WHERE 
    t.type = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU' 
    AND YEAR(a.date) = 1993;

SELECT T1.account_id, T3.A2, T3.A3
FROM account AS T1
JOIN trans AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
JOIN district AS T3 ON T1.district_id = T3.district_id
WHERE T1.date BETWEEN '1993-01-01' AND '1993-12-31'
AND T2.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU';

SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id, d.A2 AS district_name, d.A3 AS district_region
FROM trans t
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id AND a.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN district dt ON a.district_id = dt.district_id
WHERE YEAR(t.date) = 1993 AND d.type = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'

SELECT DISTINCT T1.account_id, T4.A2, T4.A3 FROM account AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN card AS T3 ON T2.disp_id = T3.disp_id JOIN district AS T4 ON T1.district_id = T4.district_id WHERE strftime('%Y', T1.date) = '1993' AND T3.type = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'
120: SELECT T1.account_id, T1.frequency FROM account AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id JOIN district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id WHERE T4.A2 LIKE '%east Bohemia%' AND T1.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31'

SELECT a.account_id, a.frequency
FROM account a
JOIN client c ON a.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE a.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31'
AND d.A2 = 'east Bohemia';

SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id, a.frequency
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN district dt ON c.district_id = dt.district_id
WHERE dt.A2 LIKE '%east Bohemia%'
AND a.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31'
ORDER BY dt.A2;

SELECT T1.account_id, COUNT(T4.trans_id) AS frequency_of_statement_issuance
FROM account AS T1
JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id
JOIN trans AS T4 ON T1.account_id = T4.account_id
WHERE T3.district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM district WHERE A2 = 'east Bohemia')
AND T1.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31'
GROUP BY T1.account_id;

SELECT T1.account_id, T1.frequency, COUNT(*) AS statement_count FROM account AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id JOIN district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id WHERE T4.A2 = 'east Bohemia' AND T1.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31' GROUP BY T1.account_id, T1.frequency

SELECT a.account_id, COUNT(t.trans_id) AS frequency_of_statement_issuance
FROM account a
JOIN client c ON a.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
LEFT JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id AND YEAR(t.date) BETWEEN 1995 AND 2000
WHERE d.A2 LIKE '%east Bohemia%'
GROUP BY a.account_id;

SELECT T1.account_id, COUNT(T4.trans_id) AS frequency_of_statement_issuance
FROM account AS T1
JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id
JOIN disp AS T3 ON T1.account_id = T3.account_id
JOIN trans AS T4 ON T1.account_id = T4.account_id
WHERE T2.gender IS NOT NULL AND T1.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31' AND T3.type = 'statement'
GROUP BY T1.account_id;
